-- Part 1: Transform data with attributes as columns
SELECT superhero_name, 
       performance_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_name = 'Strength' THEN result END) AS Strength,
       MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_name = 'Speed' THEN result END) AS Speed,
       MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_name = 'Intelligence' THEN result END) AS Intelligence
FROM superhero_performance
GROUP BY superhero_name, performance_date;

-- Part 2: Attributes in alphabetical order with concatenated results
SELECT superhero_name, 
       performance_date,
       string_agg(attribute_name || ': ' || result, ', ' ORDER BY attribute_name) AS attribute_results
FROM superhero_performance
GROUP BY superhero_name, performance_date;

WITH first_day_of_month AS (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AS first_day
),
weeks AS (
    SELECT 
        generate_series(
            (SELECT first_day FROM first_day_of_month),
            (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day'),
            INTERVAL '1 day'
        ) AS day,
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM generate_series(
                (SELECT first_day FROM first_day_of_month),
                (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day'),
                INTERVAL '1 day'
            )) = 0 OR 
            generate_series(
                (SELECT first_day FROM first_day_of_month),
                (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day'),
                INTERVAL '1 day'
            ) = (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day')
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_end_of_week
)
SELECT 
    'Week ' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MIN(day)) AS week_label,
    MIN(day) AS start_date,
    MAX(day) AS end_date,
    COUNT(l.id) AS record_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        day,
        SUM(is_end_of_week) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS week_number
    FROM weeks
) w
LEFT JOIN laboratory l ON l.date = w.day
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY week_number
ORDER BY week_number;

WITH reporting_dates AS (
    SELECT generate_series('2000-01-01'::date, '2017-01-01'::date, '1 year'::interval) AS reporting_date
) 
SELECT 
    reporting_date, 
    COUNT(CASE 
        WHEN OpenDate <= reporting_date AND (ClosedDate IS NULL OR ClosedDate > reporting_date) 
        THEN cdscode 
    END) AS active_schools 
FROM reporting_dates 
CROSS JOIN schools
GROUP BY reporting_date 
ORDER BY reporting_date;

WITH ranked_budgets AS (
  SELECT 
    budget_id, 
    category, 
    amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY amount) AS row_num
  FROM budget
  WHERE category IN ('Food', 'Advertisement')
),
food_budgets AS (
  SELECT 
    budget_id, 
    category, 
    amount,
    SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY amount ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_amount
  FROM ranked_budgets
  WHERE category = 'Food'
),
remaining_budget AS (
  SELECT 500 - COALESCE((SELECT MAX(cum_amount) FROM food_budgets), 0) AS remaining
),
ad_budgets AS (
  SELECT 
    budget_id, 
    category, 
    amount,
    SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY amount ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS category_cum_amount,
    (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(cum_amount), 0) FROM food_budgets) + 
    SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY amount ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS total_cum_amount
  FROM ranked_budgets
  WHERE category = 'Advertisement'
)
SELECT 
  budget_id, 
  category, 
  amount, 
  cum_amount
FROM (
  SELECT 
    budget_id, 
    category, 
    amount, 
    cum_amount,
    1 AS priority
  FROM food_budgets
  WHERE cum_amount <= 500
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    budget_id, 
    category, 
    amount, 
    total_cum_amount AS cum_amount,
    2 AS priority
  FROM ad_budgets
  WHERE category_cum_amount <= (SELECT remaining FROM remaining_budget)
) combined
ORDER BY priority, cum_amount;

-- First create the loan table (assuming it doesn't exist yet)
CREATE TABLE loan (
    loan_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    -- other loan columns here
    card_id INT UNIQUE NULL
);

-- Then create the card table with a reference to loan
CREATE TABLE card (
    card_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    loan_id INT UNIQUE,
    type TEXT NOT NULL,
    issued DATE NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT fk_loan_id FOREIGN KEY (loan_id) REFERENCES loan(loan_id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Finally, add the reference from loan back to card
ALTER TABLE loan 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_card_id FOREIGN KEY (card_id) REFERENCES card(card_id) ON DELETE SET NULL;

WITH update_result AS (
    UPDATE loan
    SET status = 'updated_status',
        date = 'new_date'::date,
        amount = 'new_amount'::bigint
    WHERE loan_id = 'loan_id_value'::bigint
    RETURNING loan_id, status
),
outcome AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM update_result) > 0 THEN 'successful update'
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan WHERE loan_id = 'loan_id_value'::bigint) = 0 THEN 'loan not found'
            ELSE 'version conflict'
        END AS result
)
SELECT result FROM outcome;

    )

WITH buy_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        usd_total / molecules AS price_per_molecule
    FROM transaction
    WHERE sell = FALSE
    ORDER BY molecule_id, date
),

sell_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        usd_total / molecules AS price_per_molecule
    FROM transaction
    WHERE sell = TRUE
    ORDER BY molecule_id, date
),

allocation AS (
    WITH RECURSIVE allocation_calc AS (
        -- Initial state: Start with the first buy and sell transactions
        SELECT 
            b.transaction_id AS buy_id,
            s.transaction_id AS sell_id,
            b.molecule_id,
            b.date AS buy_date,
            s.date AS sell_date,
            b.price_per_molecule AS buy_price,
            s.price_per_molecule AS sell_price,
            LEAST(b.molecules, s.molecules) AS allocated_molecules,
            b.molecules - LEAST(b.molecules, s.molecules) AS remaining_buy,
            s.molecules - LEAST(b.molecules, s.molecules) AS remaining_sell,
            1 AS allocation_order
        FROM buy_transactions b
        JOIN sell_transactions s ON b.molecule_id = s.molecule_id
        WHERE b.transaction_id = (
            SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
            WHERE molecule_id = s.molecule_id
        )
        AND s.transaction_id = (
            SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions
            WHERE molecule_id = b.molecule_id
        )
        
        UNION ALL
        
        -- Recursive part: Continue allocating remaining molecules
        SELECT 
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id)
                ELSE a.buy_id
            END AS buy_id,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id)
                ELSE a.sell_id
            END AS sell_id,
            a.molecule_id,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT date FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id))
                ELSE a.buy_date
            END AS buy_date,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT date FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id))
                ELSE a.sell_date
            END AS sell_date,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT price_per_molecule FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id))
                ELSE a.buy_price
            END AS buy_price,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT price_per_molecule FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id))
                ELSE a.sell_price
            END AS sell_price,
            LEAST(
                CASE WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_buy END,
                CASE WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_sell END
            ) AS allocated_molecules,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_buy
            END - LEAST(
                CASE WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_buy END,
                CASE WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_sell END
            ) AS remaining_buy,
            CASE 
                WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_sell
            END - LEAST(
                CASE WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM buy_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_buy END,
                CASE WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                    (SELECT molecules FROM sell_transactions 
                     WHERE transaction_id = (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                                            WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id))
                ELSE a.remaining_sell END
            ) AS remaining_sell,
            a.allocation_order + 1 AS allocation_order
        FROM allocation_calc a
        WHERE 
            (a.remaining_buy > 0 OR a.remaining_sell > 0) AND
            (CASE WHEN a.remaining_buy <= 0 THEN 
                (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM buy_transactions 
                 WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.buy_id)
             ELSE a.buy_id END) IS NOT NULL AND
            (CASE WHEN a.remaining_sell <= 0 THEN 
                (SELECT MIN(transaction_id) FROM sell_transactions 
                 WHERE molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND transaction_id > a.sell_id)
             ELSE a.sell_id END) IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT * FROM allocation_calc
    WHERE allocated_molecules > 0
)

SELECT 
    molecule_id,
    buy_date,
    sell_date,
    allocated_molecules AS molecules,
    ROUND(allocated_molecules * buy_price, 2) AS buy_usd_total,
    ROUND(allocated_molecules * sell_price, 2) AS sell_usd_total
FROM allocation
ORDER BY molecule_id, buy_date, sell_date;

WITH RECURSIVE 
    weekdays AS (
        SELECT generate_series(0, 60) AS offset
    ),
    dates AS (
        SELECT 
            CURRENT_DATE + (w.offset || ' days')::interval AS date,
            to_char(CURRENT_DATE + (w.offset || ' days')::interval, 'Day') AS day_name
        FROM weekdays w
        WHERE CURRENT_DATE + (w.offset || ' days')::interval <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '2 months'
    ),
    schedule_blocks_with_dates AS (
        SELECT 
            sb.*,
            d.date AS block_date
        FROM schedule_blocks sb
        JOIN dates d ON TRIM(sb.day_of_week) = TRIM(d.day_name)
        WHERE sb.is_available = TRUE
    )
SELECT 
    block_id,
    user_id,
    block_date AS date,
    start_time,
    end_time
FROM schedule_blocks_with_dates
ORDER BY date, start_time;

WITH ordered_predictions AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prediction_code) AS row_num
    FROM performance_predictions
),
grouped_predictions AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        SUM(CASE WHEN group_start THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY row_num) AS group_num
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            prediction_code,
            Performance_Prediction,
            row_num,
            CASE WHEN SUM(Performance_Prediction) OVER (
                ORDER BY row_num
                ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
            ) IS NULL OR 
            (SUM(Performance_Prediction) OVER (
                ORDER BY row_num
                ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
            ) % 200) + Performance_Prediction > 200
            THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS group_start
        FROM ordered_predictions
    ) t
)
SELECT 
    group_num,
    SUM(Performance_Prediction) AS group_sum
FROM grouped_predictions
GROUP BY group_num
ORDER BY group_num;

-- Part 1: Top 2 events per member
WITH MemberEventCounts AS (
  SELECT 
    link_to_member,
    link_to_event,
    COUNT(*) AS attendance_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY link_to_member ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS event_rank
  FROM attendance
  GROUP BY link_to_member, link_to_event
)
SELECT 
  m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS member_name,
  e.event_name,
  mec.attendance_count
FROM MemberEventCounts mec
JOIN member m ON mec.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN event e ON mec.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE mec.event_rank <= 2
ORDER BY mec.link_to_member, mec.event_rank

UNION ALL

-- Part 2: Top 1 member per event
SELECT 
  'Top member for event: ' || e.event_name AS member_name,
  e.event_name,
  mec.attendance_count
FROM (
  SELECT 
    link_to_event,
    link_to_member,
    COUNT(*) AS attendance_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY link_to_event ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS member_rank
  FROM attendance
  GROUP BY link_to_event, link_to_member
) mec
JOIN member m ON mec.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN event e ON mec.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE mec.member_rank = 1
ORDER BY e.event_name;

-- Part 1: Top 2 gas stations (events) per customer (member) based on transaction count
WITH customer_stations AS (
  SELECT 
    t.customerid,
    t.gasstationid,
    COUNT(*) AS visit_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.customerid ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
  FROM transactions_1k t
  GROUP BY t.customerid, t.gasstationid
)
SELECT 
  cs.customerid,
  cs.gasstationid,
  g.country,
  g.segment,
  cs.visit_count
FROM customer_stations cs
JOIN gasstations g ON cs.gasstationid = g.gasstationid
WHERE cs.rank <= 2
ORDER BY cs.customerid, cs.rank;

-- Part 2: Top 1 customer (member) per gas station (event) based on transaction count
WITH station_customers AS (
  SELECT 
    t.gasstationid,
    t.customerid,
    COUNT(*) AS visit_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.gasstationid ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
  FROM transactions_1k t
  GROUP BY t.gasstationid, t.customerid
)
SELECT 
  sc.gasstationid,
  g.country,
  g.segment,
  sc.customerid,
  c.segment AS customer_segment,
  sc.visit_count
FROM station_customers sc
JOIN gasstations g ON sc.gasstationid = g.gasstationid
JOIN customers c ON sc.customerid = c.customerid
WHERE sc.rank = 1
ORDER BY sc.gasstationid;

-- First, backup the current latest table
TRUNCATE TABLE treatment_and_followup_backup;
INSERT INTO treatment_and_followup_backup
SELECT * FROM treatment_and_followup_latest;

-- Then perform the merge operation
MERGE INTO treatment_and_followup_latest l
USING treatment_and_followup s
ON l.patient_id = s.patient_id AND l.treatment_followup_id = s.treatment_followup_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET 
    followup_no = s.followup_no,
    primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score = s.primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score,
    primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group = s.primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    primary_pathology_radiation_therapy = s.primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
    primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx = s.primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    has_follow_ups_information = s.has_follow_ups_information,
    has_drugs_information = s.has_drugs_information,
    has_radiations_information = s.has_radiations_information,
    project = s.project,
    day_of_form_completion = s.day_of_form_completion,
    month_of_form_completion = s.month_of_form_completion,
    year_of_form_completion = s.year_of_form_completion
WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
  INSERT (treatment_followup_id, patient_id, followup_no, primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score, 
          primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group, primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
          primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx, has_follow_ups_information, has_drugs_information,
          has_radiations_information, project, day_of_form_completion, month_of_form_completion,
          year_of_form_completion)
  VALUES (s.treatment_followup_id, s.patient_id, s.followup_no, s.primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score,
          s.primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group, s.primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
          s.primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx, s.has_follow_ups_information, s.has_drugs_information,
          s.has_radiations_information, s.project, s.day_of_form_completion, s.month_of_form_completion,
          s.year_of_form_completion)
WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE THEN
  DELETE;

WITH line_segments AS (
  -- This is a placeholder for your actual school district boundary lines
  -- You would replace this with your actual geometry data from your tables
  SELECT cdscode AS id, 
         -- You need to replace this with your actual geometry column
         -- For example: boundary_geom AS geom
         'LINESTRING(0 0, 0 10)'::geometry AS geom
  FROM schools
  WHERE -- Add conditions to filter for your boundary lines
        cdscode IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT a.id AS segment_id, 
       b.id AS intersecting_segment_id,
       ST_AsText(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom)) AS intersection_point
FROM line_segments AS a
JOIN line_segments AS b ON a.id < b.id -- Avoid duplicate comparisons
WHERE ST_Intersects(a.geom, b.geom)
  AND NOT ST_Touches(a.geom, b.geom) -- Lines that intersect but don't just touch at endpoints
  AND ST_Dimension(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom)) = 0 -- Intersection is a point
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      -- Check if the intersection point is an endpoint of either line
      SELECT 1 
      FROM line_segments AS c
      WHERE (c.id = a.id OR c.id = b.id)
        AND (ST_Equals(ST_StartPoint(c.geom), ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom)) 
             OR ST_Equals(ST_EndPoint(c.geom), ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom)))
  );

WITH business_days AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_business_days
    FROM generate_series(
        DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') + 1,  -- Start from the next day
        DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24') - 1,  -- End at the previous day
        interval '1 day'
    ) AS the_day
    WHERE EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM the_day) < 6  -- Only weekdays (1-5)
),
start_day_info AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') < 6 THEN 
                EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (TIME '24:00:00' - TIME '10:34:36')) * 3600 + 
                EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM TIME '10:34:36') * 60 + 
                EXTRACT(SECOND FROM TIME '10:34:36')
            ELSE 0
        END AS start_day_seconds
),
end_day_info AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24') < 6 THEN 
                EXTRACT(HOUR FROM TIME '15:12:24') * 3600 + 
                EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM TIME '15:12:24') * 60 + 
                EXTRACT(SECOND FROM TIME '15:12:24')
            ELSE 0
        END AS end_day_seconds
),
total_seconds AS (
    SELECT 
        (num_business_days * 86400) + 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') < 6 AND 
                 EXTRACT('ISODOW' FROM TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24') < 6 AND
                 DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36') = DATE(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24')
            THEN 
                end_day_seconds - (86400 - start_day_seconds)
            ELSE
                end_day_seconds + start_day_seconds
        END AS total_business_seconds
    FROM business_days, start_day_info, end_day_info
)
SELECT 
    FLOOR(total_business_seconds / 86400)::text || ' days ' || 
    FLOOR((total_business_seconds % 86400) / 3600)::text || ' hours ' || 
    FLOOR((total_business_seconds % 3600) / 60)::text || ' minutes ' || 
    (total_business_seconds % 60)::text || ' seconds' AS business_time_diff
FROM total_seconds;

WITH co_occurrences AS (
    SELECT 
        l.cluster AS left_id, 
        l.cluster_type AS left_type, 
        l.cluster_label AS left_label,
        r.cluster AS right_id, 
        r.cluster_type AS right_type, 
        r.cluster_label AS right_label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.article) AS articles
    FROM 
        tag AS l
    JOIN 
        tag AS r ON l.article = r.article AND l.cluster > r.cluster
    GROUP BY 
        l.cluster, l.cluster_type, l.cluster_label, 
        r.cluster, r.cluster_type, r.cluster_label
),
link_info AS (
    SELECT 
        GREATEST(source_cluster, target_cluster) AS big,
        LEAST(source_cluster, target_cluster) AS small,
        type
    FROM 
        link
)
SELECT 
    co.left_id, 
    co.left_type, 
    co.left_label,
    co.right_id, 
    co.right_type, 
    co.right_label,
    co.articles,
    ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT li.type) FILTER (WHERE li.type IS NOT NULL) AS link_types
FROM 
    co_occurrences co
LEFT JOIN 
    link_info li ON co.left_id = li.big AND co.right_id = li.small
GROUP BY 
    co.left_id, co.left_type, co.left_label,
    co.right_id, co.right_type, co.right_label,
    co.articles
ORDER BY 
    co.articles DESC;

WITH RankedSchools AS (
  SELECT 
    county,
    opendate,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY opendate) AS rank_in_county
  FROM schools
  WHERE opendate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  county,
  MIN(CASE WHEN rank_in_county = 1 THEN opendate END) AS earliest_open_date,
  MIN(CASE WHEN rank_in_county = 4 THEN opendate END) AS fourth_open_date
FROM RankedSchools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 4
GROUP BY county
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN rank_in_county = 4 THEN 1 END) > 0

WITH PublicHighest AS (
    SELECT MAX(outcm."Pre_Test_Score") AS highest_score
    FROM outcomes AS outcm 
    JOIN enrollment AS enrl ON outcm.learner_code = enrl.learner_code 
    JOIN institutions AS inst ON enrl.institution_key = inst.institution_key 
    WHERE inst."Institution_Type" = 'Public'
),
PrivateHighest AS (
    SELECT MAX(outcm."Pre_Test_Score") AS highest_score
    FROM outcomes AS outcm 
    JOIN enrollment AS enrl ON outcm.learner_code = enrl.learner_code 
    JOIN institutions AS inst ON enrl.institution_key = inst.institution_key 
    WHERE inst."Institution_Type" = 'Private'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT highest_score FROM PublicHighest) - 
    (SELECT highest_score FROM PrivateHighest) AS score_diff;

WITH PublicAvg AS (
    SELECT AVG(outcm."Pre_Test_Score") AS avg_score
    FROM outcomes AS outcm 
    JOIN enrollment AS enrl ON outcm.learner_code = enrl.learner_code 
    JOIN institutions AS inst ON enrl.institution_key = inst.institution_key 
    WHERE inst."Institution_Type" = 'Public'
),
PrivateAvg AS (
    SELECT AVG(outcm."Pre_Test_Score") AS avg_score
    FROM outcomes AS outcm 
    JOIN enrollment AS enrl ON outcm.learner_code = enrl.learner_code 
    JOIN institutions AS inst ON enrl.institution_key = inst.institution_key 
    WHERE inst."Institution_Type" = 'Private'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_score FROM PublicAvg) - 
    (SELECT avg_score FROM PrivateAvg) AS avg_score_diff;

                      primary_pathology_init_pathology_dx_method_other) LIKE 'Other method, specify:' 
        THEN NULL 
        ELSE primary_pathology_neoplasm_histologic_grade 
    END AS histologic_grade,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(primary_pathology_initial_pathologic_diagnosis_method, 
                      primary_pathology_init_pathology_dx_method_other) LIKE 'Other method, specify:' 
        THEN NULL 
        ELSE primary_pathology_days_to_initial_pathologic_diagnosis 
    END AS days_to_initial_diagnosis,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(primary_pathology_initial_pathologic_diagnosis_method, 
                      primary_pathology_init_pathology_dx_method_other) LIKE 'Other method, specify:'

    END AS age_at_initial_diagnosis
FROM

WITH patient_data AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(primary_pathology_initial_pathologic_diagnosis_method, 
                          primary_pathology_init_pathology_dx_method_other) LIKE 'Other method, specify:' 
            THEN TRUE 
            ELSE FALSE 
        END AS should_redact
    FROM 
        pathology_and_surgery
)
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN should_redact THEN NULL ELSE primary_pathology_neoplasm_histologic_grade END AS histologic_grade,
    CASE WHEN should_redact THEN NULL ELSE primary_pathology_days_to_initial_pathologic_diagnosis END AS days_to_initial_diagnosis,
    CASE WHEN should_redact THEN NULL ELSE primary_pathology_age_at_initial_pathologic_diagnosis END AS age_at_initial_diagnosis
FROM

WITH merged_periods AS (
  SELECT 
    alb,
    art,
    feat_arts,
    MIN(start_date) AS start_date,
    CASE 
      WHEN bool_or(end_date IS NULL) THEN NULL
      ELSE MAX(end_date)
    END AS end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      alb,
      art,
      feat_arts,
      MIN(start_date) AS start_date,
      MAX(COALESCE(end_date, '9999-12-31'::date)) AS end_date
    FROM sp_album
    GROUP BY 
      alb, art, feat_arts, 
      -- This identifies continuous date ranges by grouping records where there's no gap
      (SELECT COUNT(*) 
       FROM sp_album sa2 
       WHERE sa2.alb = sp_album.alb 
         AND sa2.art = sp_album.art 
         AND sa2.feat_arts = sp_album.feat_arts 
         AND sa2.start_date <= sp_album.start_date 
         AND (sa2.end_date IS NULL OR sa2.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day' >= sp_album.start_date))
  ) subquery
  GROUP BY alb, art, feat_arts
)
SELECT 
  alb,
  art,
  feat_arts,
  start_date,
  CASE 
    WHEN end_date = '9999-12-31'::date THEN NULL
    ELSE end_date
  END AS end_date
FROM merged_periods
ORDER BY alb, art, start_date;

SELECT 
    t.tissue_source_site,
    t.total_patients,
    v.consent_verified,
    ROUND((v.consent_verified * 100.0 / t.total_patients), 2) AS consent_percentage
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        tissue_source_site, 
        COUNT(*) AS total_patients 
     FROM patients 
     GROUP BY tissue_source_site) t
INNER JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        tissue_source_site, 
        COUNT(*) AS consent_verified 
     FROM patients 
     WHERE informed_consent_verified = true 
     GROUP BY tissue_source_site) v
ON t.tissue_source_site = v.tissue_source_site
ORDER BY t.tissue_source_site;

SELECT 
    tissue_source_site,
    COUNT(*) AS total_patients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN informed_consent_verified = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS consent_verified,
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN informed_consent_verified = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)), 2) AS consent_percentage
FROM 
    patients
GROUP BY 
    tissue_source_site
ORDER BY 
    tissue_source_site;

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT 
        "gasstationid" AS "GasstationId", 
        "customerid" AS "CustomerId", 
        "date" AS "SaleDate", 
        "amount" AS "Amount" 
    FROM "transactions_1k"
), 
initial_purchase AS (
    SELECT 
        "GasstationId", 
        "CustomerId", 
        MIN("SaleDate") AS "FirstPurchaseDate" 
    FROM sales 
    GROUP BY "GasstationId", "CustomerId"
)
SELECT 
    s."CustomerId",
    s."GasstationId",
    s."SaleDate",
    s."Amount"
FROM sales s
JOIN initial_purchase i ON 
    s."CustomerId" = i."CustomerId" AND 
    s."GasstationId" = i."GasstationId"
WHERE s."SaleDate" >= i."FirstPurchaseDate"
ORDER BY s."CustomerId", s."GasstationId", s."SaleDate"

DO $$
DECLARE
    stmt TEXT;
BEGIN
    FOR stmt IN
        SELECT 'ALTER TABLE ' || quote_ident(table_schema) || '.' || quote_ident(table_name) 
               || ' RENAME COLUMN ' || quote_ident(column_name) 
               || ' TO ' || quote_ident(lower(column_name)) || ';'
        FROM information_schema.columns
        WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog')
        AND table_schema = 'public'  -- Assuming tables are in public schema
        AND column_name <> lower(column_name)
        ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, column_name
    LOOP
        EXECUTE stmt;
    END LOOP;
END $$;

WITH product_list AS (
    SELECT ARRAY[101, 103] AS ids
)
SELECT CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE product_id IN (SELECT unnest(ids) FROM product_list)) = 
         (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE product_id IN (SELECT unnest(ids) FROM product_list) AND is_searchable = true)
    THEN (SELECT array_agg(product_id) FROM product WHERE product_id IN (SELECT unnest(ids) FROM product_list))
    ELSE NULL
END AS product_ids;

WITH product_list AS (
    SELECT ARRAY[101, 103] AS ids
),
all_searchable AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE product_id IN (SELECT unnest(ids) FROM product_list)) = 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE product_id IN (SELECT unnest(ids) FROM product_list) AND is_searchable = true) 
        AS all_are_searchable
)
SELECT product_id 
FROM product 
WHERE product_id IN (SELECT unnest(ids) FROM product_list)
AND (SELECT all_are_searchable FROM all_searchable);

WITH all_dates AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT transaction_date FROM sales_log
),
all_salespersons AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT salesperson_name FROM sales_log
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT d.transaction_date, s.salesperson_name
    FROM all_dates d
    CROSS JOIN all_salespersons s
),
actual_sales AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT transaction_date, salesperson_name
    FROM sales_log
)
SELECT c.transaction_date, c.salesperson_name
FROM all_combinations c
LEFT JOIN actual_sales a
    ON c.transaction_date = a.transaction_date 
    AND c.salesperson_name = a.salesperson_name
WHERE a.salesperson_name IS NULL
ORDER BY c.transaction_date, c.salesperson_name;

WITH ranked_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    price,
    effective_from,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY effective_from DESC) AS price_rank
  FROM ProductPrice
  WHERE effective_from <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM ranked_prices
  WHERE price_rank = 1
),
previous_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    price AS previous_price
  FROM ranked_prices
  WHERE price_rank = 2
)
SELECT 
  p.product_id, 
  p.product_name
FROM 
  Product p
JOIN latest_prices lp ON p.product_id = lp.product_id
JOIN previous_prices pp ON p.product_id = pp.product_id
WHERE 
  lp.latest_price < pp.previous_price
ORDER BY 
  p.product_id;

SELECT 
    CD.customer_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT S.transaction_date) AS total_sales,
    COALESCE(SUM(S.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT C.communication_date) AS total_communications,
    COUNT(DISTINCT F.feedback_date) AS total_feedback,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN F.feedback_type = 'positive' THEN F.feedback_date END) AS total_positive_feedback,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN F.feedback_type = 'negative' THEN F.feedback_date END) AS total_negative_feedback
FROM 
    customer_details CD
LEFT JOIN 
    sales S ON CD.customer_id = S.customer_id
LEFT JOIN 
    communications C ON CD.customer_id = C.customer_id
LEFT JOIN 
    feedback F ON CD.customer_id = F.customer_id
GROUP BY 
    CD.customer_id
ORDER BY 
    CD.customer_id;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS overlap_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        d.id,
        d.start,
        d.end,
        CASE
            WHEN '2011-12-19 12:00:00' >= d.start AND '2011-12-19 12:00:00' < d.end THEN 1
            WHEN '2011-12-19 15:00:00' > d.start AND '2011-12-19 15:00:00' <= d.end THEN 1
            WHEN d.start BETWEEN '2011-12-19 12:00:00' AND '2011-12-19 15:00:00' AND d.end BETWEEN '2011-12-19 12:00:00' AND '2011-12-19 15:00:00' THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS overlap
    FROM
        duration AS d
) AS subquery
WHERE
    overlap = 1;

UPDATE results
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        r.resultId,
        @rank := @rank + 1 AS ranking
    FROM 
        (SELECT @rank := 0) AS init, 
        results AS r
    JOIN 
        drivers AS d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
    ORDER BY 
        r.fastestLap ASC, 
        d.dob ASC
) AS ranked_results
ON results.resultId = ranked_results.resultId
SET results.rank = ranked_results.ranking;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN amount_sold < 1000 THEN 'Under 1000' 
        WHEN amount_sold BETWEEN 1000 AND 9999 THEN '1000 to 9999' 
        WHEN amount_sold BETWEEN 10000 AND 49999 THEN '10000 to 49999' 
        WHEN amount_sold >= 50000 THEN '50000 and above' 
    END AS sales_range, 
    AVG(amount_sold) AS avg 
FROM 
    sales_data 
GROUP BY 
    sales_range;

SELECT 
    id, 
    skill, 
    value 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        'crossing' AS skill, 
        crossing AS value,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY crossing DESC) AS skill_rank
    FROM 
        Player_Attributes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        id, 
        'finishing' AS skill, 
        finishing AS value,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY finishing DESC) AS skill_rank
    FROM 
        Player_Attributes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        id, 
        'heading_accuracy' AS skill, 
        heading_accuracy AS value,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY heading_accuracy DESC) AS skill_rank
    FROM 
        Player_Attributes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        id, 
        'short_passing' AS skill, 
        short_passing AS value,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY short_passing DESC) AS skill_rank
    FROM 
        Player_Attributes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        id, 
        'volleys' AS skill, 
        volleys AS value,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY volleys DESC) AS skill_rank
    FROM 
        Player_Attributes
) ranked_skills
WHERE 
    skill_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    id, 
    skill_rank
LIMIT 10;

SELECT TransactionID, Date, Time, CustomerID, CardID, GasStationID, ProductID, Amount, Price
FROM (
    SELECT TransactionID, Date, Time, CustomerID, CardID, GasStationID, ProductID, Amount, Price
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-22'
    ORDER BY Amount DESC
    LIMIT 3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TransactionID, Date, Time, CustomerID, CardID, GasStationID, ProductID, Amount, Price
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-23'
    ORDER BY Amount DESC
    LIMIT 3
) AS combined_transactions
ORDER BY Amount DESC
LIMIT 3;

FROM (
    SELECT 
        release_id,

        code_status_id, 
        code_created_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY code_id ORDER BY

SELECT e.event_name, COALESCE(exp.total_expense, 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(bud.total_budget, 0) AS total_budget
FROM event e
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_event, SUM(cost) AS total_expense
    FROM expense
    GROUP BY link_to_event
) exp ON e.event_id = exp.link_to_event
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_event, SUM(amount) AS total_budget
    FROM budget
    GROUP BY link_to_event
) bud ON e.event_id = bud.link_to_event;

SELECT 
    d.Date, 
    c.CustomerID, 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(t.Amount) IS NULL THEN 'No transaction exists' 
        ELSE SUM(t.Amount) 
    END AS TotalAmount
FROM 
    (SELECT DATE_ADD('2012-08-23', INTERVAL n.n DAY) AS Date
     FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3) n) d
LEFT JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON d.Date = t.Date
LEFT JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    d.Date, c.CustomerID;

WITH RECURSIVE HierarchyCTE(entityid, parentid, emission, pctcontribution, total_emission) AS (
    SELECT entityid, parentid, emission, pctcontribution, emission AS total_emission
    FROM tree_table
    WHERE entityid NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT parentid FROM tree_table WHERE parentid IS NOT NULL)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT h.entityid, h.parentid, h.emission, h.pctcontribution, h.emission + cte.total_emission * (cte.pctcontribution / 100) AS total_emission
    FROM tree_table h
    JOIN HierarchyCTE cte ON h.parentid = cte.entityid
)
SELECT entityid, parentid, total_emission AS cumulative_total
FROM HierarchyCTE
ORDER BY entityid;

SELECT * FROM rules t1 
WHERE t1.valid_from <= '2024-12-31' 
  AND (t1.valid_to >= '2022-07-01' OR t1.valid_to IS NULL) 
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM rules t2 
    WHERE t2.valid_from > t1.valid_from 
      AND t2.valid_from <= '2024-12-31' 
      AND (t2.valid_to IS NULL OR t2.valid_to > '2022-07-01') 
      AND t2.valid_from <= IFNULL(t1.valid_to, '2024-12-31')
  );

SELECT p.id, p.name 
FROM Packages p 
INNER JOIN Contents c1 ON p.id = c1.packageid AND c1.item = 'square' AND c1.size = 'A' 
INNER JOIN Contents c2 ON p.id = c2.packageid AND c2.item = 'circle' AND c2.size = 'B' 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Contents c3 
    WHERE c3.packageid = p.id 
    AND (c3.item, c3.size) NOT IN (('square', 'A'), ('circle', 'B'))
);

WITH RECURSIVE CombinedIDs AS (
    SELECT id FROM Worker1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT id FROM Worker2
),
ConsecutiveNumbers AS (
    SELECT 1 AS num
    UNION ALL
    SELECT num + 1 FROM ConsecutiveNumbers WHERE num < (SELECT MAX(id) FROM CombinedIDs)
)
SELECT MIN(num) AS lowest_missing_value
FROM ConsecutiveNumbers
LEFT JOIN CombinedIDs ON ConsecutiveNumbers.num = CombinedIDs.id
WHERE CombinedIDs.id IS NULL;

WITH T0 AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, 
           COUNT(CustomerID) AS TOTAL_TRANSACTIONS, 
           COUNT(CASE WHEN(isPassed = 'Y') THEN 1 END) as PASS_TRANSACTIONS, 
           COUNT(CASE WHEN(isPassed = 'N') THEN 1 END) as FAIL_TRANSACTIONS 
    FROM TransactionResults 
    WHERE CustomerID = 3
    GROUP BY CustomerID 
) 
UPDATE CustomerTransactions 
INNER JOIN T0 ON CustomerTransactions.CustomerID = T0.CustomerID 
SET CustomerTransactions.total_count = T0.TOTAL_TRANSACTIONS, 
    CustomerTransactions.pass_count = T0.PASS_TRANSACTIONS, 
    CustomerTransactions.fail_count = T0.FAIL_TRANSACTIONS;

WITH TransactionRank AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        COUNT(TransactionID) AS TotalTransactions,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(TransactionID) DESC) AS TransactionRank
    FROM 
        transactions_1k
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID
),
AmountRank AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        SUM(Amount) AS TotalAmountSpent,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC) AS AmountRank
    FROM 
        transactions_1k
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID
),
PriceRank AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        SUM(Price) AS TotalPricePaid,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(Price) DESC) AS PriceRank
    FROM 
        transactions_1k
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    t.TotalTransactions,
    t.TransactionRank,
    a.TotalAmountSpent,
    a.AmountRank,
    p.TotalPricePaid,
    p.PriceRank
FROM 
    TransactionRank t
JOIN 
    AmountRank a ON t.CustomerID = a.CustomerID
JOIN 
    PriceRank p ON t.CustomerID = p.CustomerID;
DELIMITER //
DELIMITER ;

SELECT A.member_id, A.first_name, A.last_name 
FROM `member` AS A 
LEFT JOIN `attendance` AS B 
ON A.member_id = B.link_to_member 
AND B.link_to_event = 'recEVTik3MlqbvLFi' 
WHERE B.link_to_member IS NULL;

SELECT 
    ProductID, 
    CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(Description, 'x', 1) AS UNSIGNED) AS count, 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(Description, 'x', -1) LIKE '%Electronics' THEN 'Electronics'
        ELSE 'Non-electronics'
    END AS type 
FROM product;

SELECT DISTINCT p1.PRODUCT 
FROM promotions p1 
JOIN promotions p2 
ON p1.PRODUCT = p2.PRODUCT 
AND p1.DISCOUNT_START <= p2.DISCOUNT_END 
AND p2.DISCOUNT_START <= p1.DISCOUNT_END 
AND p1.DISCOUNT != p2.DISCOUNT;

SELECT 
    Team, 
    (SELECT source FROM source_destination_flight WHERE Team = t.Team ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1) AS first_departure,
    (SELECT destination FROM source_destination_flight WHERE Team = t.Team ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1) AS final_arrival
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT Team FROM source_destination_flight) t;

SELECT 
    ct.c_id, 
    DATE(bt.start_time) AS date, 
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN trip_counts.trip_count >= 3 THEN tc_day.cost 
        ELSE tc_single.cost 
    END) AS total_cost 
FROM 
    CustomerTrip ct 
JOIN 
    BusTrip bt ON ct.b_id = bt.b_id 
JOIN 
    (SELECT b_id, DATE(start_time) AS trip_date, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM BusTrip GROUP BY b_id, DATE(start_time)) trip_counts 
ON 
    ct.b_id = trip_counts.b_id AND DATE(bt.start_time) = trip_counts.trip_date 
JOIN 
    TicketCosts tc_single ON tc_single.duration = 'Single' 
JOIN 
    TicketCosts tc_day ON tc_day.duration = 'Day' 
GROUP BY 
    ct.c_id, DATE(bt.start_time);

SELECT Year, DisplayName, nbrOfComments 
FROM (
    SELECT YEAR(c.CreationDate) AS Year, u.DisplayName, COUNT(c.id) AS nbrOfComments,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(c.CreationDate) ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC) AS rn
    FROM comments AS c 
    INNER JOIN users AS u ON c.UserId = u.id 
    GROUP BY Year, u.id
) AS subquery
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH RankedTransactions AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID, 
        p.Description, 
        t.Date, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CustomerID ORDER BY t.Date DESC) as rn
    FROM 
        transactions_1k t
    INNER JOIN 
        products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID, 
    Description, 
    Date
FROM 
    RankedTransactions
WHERE 
    rn = 1;

SELECT 
    p1.product_name AS first_product,
    p2.product_name AS second_product,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND((COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT customer_id, product_name, purchase_rank FROM orders WHERE purchase_rank > 1) AS subquery)), 2) AS percentage
FROM 
    orders p1
JOIN 
    orders p2 
ON 
    p1.customer_id = p2.customer_id 
    AND p1.purchase_rank + 1 = p2.purchase_rank
GROUP BY 
    p1.product_name, p2.product_name
ORDER BY 
    pair_count DESC;

CREATE TABLE `content` (
    `id` serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
    `item_id` int NOT NULL,
    `nested_item_id` int,
    `block_id` int,
    `order` int NOT NULL
);
DELIMITER //

CREATE TRIGGER before_content_insert_update
BEFORE INSERT ON content
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    IF NEW.nested_item_id = NEW.id THEN
        SIGNAL SQLSTATE '45000'
        SET MESSAGE_TEXT = 'nested_item_id cannot be equal to id';
    END IF;
END//
DELIMITER ;

SELECT SUM(t1.quantity) AS total 
FROM products t1 
JOIN (
    SELECT order_id, MAX(id) AS max_id 
    FROM records 
    GROUP BY order_id
) t3 ON t1.order_id = t3.order_id 
JOIN records t2 ON t3.order_id = t2.order_id AND t3.max_id = t2.id 
WHERE t2.order_status = 'A';

SELECT 
    ct.type, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.cardID) AS type_count, 
    SUM(ct.cardID) AS sum_cardID,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cardID) FROM info WHERE cardID IN (SELECT cardID FROM card_type WHERE type = ct.type)) AS info_cardID_count,
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT i.cardID) AS DOUBLE) / SUM(ct.cardID) AS ratio
FROM 
    card_type ct
JOIN 
    info i ON ct.cardID = i.cardID
GROUP BY 
    ct.type
ORDER BY 
    type_count DESC;

SELECT 5 AS RATES, COUNT(A8) AS A8_COUNT, COUNT(A9) AS A9_COUNT FROM district WHERE A8 = 5 OR A9 = 5
UNION ALL
SELECT 4 AS RATES, COUNT(A8) AS A8_COUNT, COUNT(A9) AS A9_COUNT FROM district WHERE A8 = 4 OR A9 = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT 3 AS RATES, COUNT(A8) AS A8_COUNT, COUNT(A9) AS A9_COUNT FROM district WHERE A8 = 3 OR A9 = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT 2 AS RATES, COUNT(A8) AS A8_COUNT, COUNT(A9) AS A9_COUNT FROM district WHERE A8 = 2 OR A9 = 2
UNION ALL
SELECT 1 AS RATES, COUNT(A8) AS A8_COUNT, COUNT(A9) AS A9_COUNT FROM district WHERE A8 = 1 OR A9 = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 0 AS RATES, COUNT(A8) AS A8_COUNT, COUNT(A9) AS A9_COUNT FROM district WHERE A8 = 0 OR A9 = 0
ORDER BY RATES DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE DateRange AS (
  SELECT '2010-01-01' AS date
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DATE_ADD(date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  FROM DateRange
  WHERE date < '2014-12-31'
),
Holidays AS (
  SELECT '2010-01-01' AS date UNION ALL
  SELECT '2010-07-04' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2010-11-11' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2010-12-25' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2011-01-01' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2011-07-04' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2011-11-11' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2011-12-25' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2012-01-01' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2012-07-04' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2012-11-11' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2012-12-25' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2013-01-01' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2013-07-04' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2013-11-11' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2013-12-25' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2014-01-01' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2014-07-04' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2014-11-11' UNION ALL
  SELECT '2014-12-25'
)
SELECT
  u.Id,
  u.DisplayName,
  u.Age,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(dr.date) NOT IN (1, 7) AND dr.date NOT IN (SELECT date FROM Holidays) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TotalDays
FROM
  users u
JOIN
  DateRange dr ON dr.date BETWEEN u.CreationDate AND u.LastAccessDate
GROUP BY
  u.Id, u.DisplayName, u.Age
ORDER BY
  u.Id;

SELECT t1.CustomerID as Customer1, t2.CustomerID as Customer2, COUNT(*) as Count 
FROM transactions_1k t1 
JOIN transactions_1k t2 
ON t1.Date = t2.Date AND t1.GasStationID = t2.GasStationID AND t1.CustomerID < t2.CustomerID 
GROUP BY Customer1, Customer2 
ORDER BY Count DESC;

WITH DAILY_REVENUE AS (
    SELECT Date, GasStationID, SUM(Amount) AS TotalAmount 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    GROUP BY Date, GasStationID 
    ORDER BY Date ASC
), 
MOVING_AVG AS (
    SELECT 
        Date, 
        GasStationID, 
        SUM(TotalAmount) OVER(PARTITION BY GasStationID ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS TotalAmount,
        CAST(AVG(TotalAmount) OVER(PARTITION BY GasStationID ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS AverageAmount 
    FROM DAILY_REVENUE
)
SELECT * 
FROM MOVING_AVG 
WHERE Date >= (SELECT MIN(Date) + INTERVAL 2 DAY FROM transactions_1k);

WITH RECURSIVE set_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT id, code, parentCode, CAST(code AS CHAR(255)) AS ancestralCode
    FROM sets
    UNION ALL
    SELECT s.id, s.code, s.parentCode, CONCAT(sh.ancestralCode, '-', s.code)
    FROM sets s
    INNER JOIN set_hierarchy sh ON s.parentCode = sh.code
)
SELECT id, code, ancestralCode
FROM set_hierarchy
WHERE parentCode IS NOT NULL;

SELECT  event.event_id AS event_id,
        event.event_name AS event_name,
        MAX(attendance.link_to_member) AS largest_member_attendance,
        MAX(expense.link_to_member) AS largest_member_expense,
        AVG(expense.cost) AS average_expense_cost,
        MAX(income.link_to_member) AS largest_member_income,
        AVG(income.amount) AS average_income_amount
FROM event
LEFT JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event
LEFT JOIN expense ON event.event_id = expense.link_to_budget
LEFT JOIN income ON event.event_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE event.event_id = 'recI43CzsZ0Q625ma'
GROUP BY event.event_id;

SELECT CONCAT('ALTER TABLE digital_localization_analysis DROP COLUMN ', COLUMN_NAME, ';') AS drop_statement
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'card_games' 
AND TABLE_NAME = 'digital_localization_analysis' 
AND COLUMN_NAME NOT IN (
    SELECT COLUMN_NAME 
    FROM (
        SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COUNT(*) AS non_null_count
        FROM digital_localization_analysis
        GROUP BY COLUMN_NAME
    ) AS subquery
    WHERE non_null_count > 0
);

SELECT 
    results.score, 
    scores.value, 
    scores.Segment 
FROM 
    customer_results results
JOIN 
    customer_scores scores 
ON 
    scores.Segment = results.Segment 
    AND scores.score = (
        SELECT 
            MAX(score) 
        FROM 
            customer_scores 
        WHERE 
            Segment = results.Segment 
            AND score <= results.score
    )
ORDER BY 
    results.CustomerID DESC;

WITH Partitioned AS (
    SELECT *, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) AS RowNumber,
           LAG(Date) OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) AS PreviousDate
    FROM transactions_1k
)
SELECT *, 
       CASE 
           WHEN RowNumber > 1 THEN DATEDIFF(Date, PreviousDate)
           ELSE 0
       END AS Days_between
FROM Partitioned;

SELECT hp1.hero_id AS id1, hp2.hero_id AS id2
FROM (
    SELECT hero_id, GROUP_CONCAT(power_id ORDER BY power_id SEPARATOR ',') AS power_set
    FROM hero_power
    GROUP BY hero_id
) hp1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT hero_id, GROUP_CONCAT(power_id ORDER BY power_id SEPARATOR ',') AS power_set
    FROM hero_power
    GROUP BY hero_id
) hp2
ON hp1.hero_id < hp2.hero_id
WHERE hp1.power_set = hp2.power_set;

FROM dept_counts 
WHERE cnt = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM dept_counts)

SELECT 
    link_to_event,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Closed' THEN 'Closed'
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Open' AND MIN(event_status) = 'Planning' THEN 'Open'
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Open' THEN 'Open'
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Planning' THEN 'Planning'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS event_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Closed' THEN MAX(remaining)
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Open' AND MIN(event_status) = 'Planning' THEN MAX(spent)
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Open' THEN MAX(spent)
        WHEN MAX(event_status) = 'Planning' THEN MAX(spent)
        ELSE MAX(spent)
    END AS remaining
FROM 
    budget
GROUP BY 
    link_to_event;

WITH MatchWithPrevDate AS (
    SELECT 
        m.date,
        LAG(m.date) OVER (PARTITION BY m.league_id, m.season ORDER BY m.date) AS prev_date
    FROM 
        Match m
    WHERE 
        m.league_id = 1
),
MatchWithIslandStart AS (
    SELECT 
        date,
        CASE 
            WHEN DATE_SUB(date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) = prev_date THEN NULL
            ELSE date
        END AS island_start
    FROM 
        MatchWithPrevDate
)
SELECT 
    MIN(date) AS start_date,
    MAX(date) AS end_date
FROM 
    MatchWithIslandStart
GROUP BY 
    island_start
ORDER BY 
    start_date ASC;

SELECT
    s.School,
    sa.AvgScrRead,
    sa.AvgScrMath,
    sa.AvgScrWrite
FROM
    schools AS s
INNER JOIN

WHERE
    s.County = 'Alameda'
    AND sa.rtype = 'S'

        FROM satscores

    );

WITH ChangeHistory AS (
    SELECT
        s.CDSCode,
        s.School,
        s.FundingType,
        s.LastUpdate,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.CDSCode ORDER BY s.LastUpdate) AS ChangeSequence,
        LAG(s.School) OVER (PARTITION BY s.CDSCode ORDER BY s.LastUpdate) AS PreviousSchool,
        LAG(s.FundingType) OVER (PARTITION BY s.CDSCode ORDER BY s.LastUpdate) AS PreviousFundingType
    FROM schools s
),
ChangesOnly AS (
    SELECT
        ch.CDSCode,
        ch.ChangeSequence,
        ch.School,
        ch.FundingType,
        ch.PreviousSchool,
        ch.PreviousFundingType,
        CASE WHEN ch.PreviousSchool IS NULL OR ch.PreviousSchool <> ch.School THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SchoolChanged,
        CASE WHEN ch.PreviousFundingType IS NULL OR ch.PreviousFundingType <> ch.FundingType THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FundingTypeChanged
    FROM ChangeHistory ch
    WHERE ch.SchoolChanged = 1 OR ch.FundingTypeChanged = 1
)
SELECT
    c.CDSCode,
    'School' AS ColumnName,
    ISNULL(c.PreviousSchool, '') AS OldValue,
    ISNULL(c.School, '') AS NewValue
FROM ChangesOnly c
WHERE c.SchoolChanged = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT
    c.CDSCode,
    'FundingType' AS ColumnName,
    COALESCE(c.PreviousFundingType, '') AS OldValue,
    COALESCE(c.FundingType, '') AS NewValue
FROM ChangesOnly c
WHERE c.FundingTypeChanged = 1
ORDER BY
    c.CDSCode,
    c.ChangeSequence,
    CASE WHEN ColumnName = 'School' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END;

MERGE INTO account AS target
USING (VALUES 
    (4, 10, 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU', '2023-04-01'),
    (9999, 3, 'POPLATEK TYDNE', '2024-10-22')
) AS source (account_id, district_id, frequency, date)
ON target.account_id = source.account_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET frequency = source.frequency, date = source.date
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (account_id, district_id, frequency, date)
    VALUES (source.account_id, source.district_id, source.frequency, source.date);

WITH RankedEvents AS (
    SELECT 
        event_id, 
        notes, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY event_id ASC) AS rn
    FROM 
        event
),
ImputedNotes AS (
    SELECT 
        event_id, 
        notes AS imputed_notes,
        rn
    FROM 
        RankedEvents
    WHERE 
        rn = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        re.event_id, 
        COALESCE(re.notes, inotes.imputed_notes) AS imputed_notes,
        re.rn
    FROM 
        RankedEvents re
    INNER JOIN 
        ImputedNotes inotes
    ON 
        re.rn = inotes.rn + 1
)
SELECT 
    event_id, 
    imputed_notes
FROM 
    ImputedNotes
ORDER BY 
    event_id;

SELECT 
    m.first_name + ' ' + m.last_name AS member_name,
    a.link_to_member,
    MAX(a.link_to_event) AS Latest_Attendance_Date
FROM 
    attendance a
JOIN 
    member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE 
    m.position <> 'Alumni'
GROUP BY 
    m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_member
ORDER BY 
    Latest_Attendance_Date DESC;

WITH PreviousTransactions AS (
    SELECT 
        trans_id, 
        account_id, 
        date, 
        LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY date) AS previous_date
    FROM 
        trans
)
SELECT 
    trans_id, 
    account_id, 
    date, 
    CASE 
        WHEN previous_date IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(DAY, previous_date, date) > 30 THEN 'New'
        ELSE 'Followup'
    END AS Category
FROM 
    PreviousTransactions
ORDER BY 
    trans_id;

WITH cte AS (
    SELECT 
        m1.member_id AS member1_id,
        m1.first_name AS member1_first_name,
        m1.last_name AS member1_last_name,
        m2.member_id AS member2_id,
        m2.first_name AS member2_first_name,
        m2.last_name AS member2_last_name,
        e.event_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY m1.member_id, m2.member_id ORDER BY e.event_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        attendance a1
    JOIN 
        attendance a2 ON a1.link_to_event = a2.link_to_event AND a1.link_to_member < a2.link_to_member
    JOIN 
        member m1 ON a1.link_to_member = m1.member_id
    JOIN 
        member m2 ON a2.link_to_member = m2.member_id
    JOIN 
        event e ON a1.link_to_event = e.event_id
)
SELECT TOP 1
    member1_id,
    member1_first_name,
    member1_last_name,
    member2_id,
    member2_first_name,
    member2_last_name,
    event_date
FROM 
    cte
WHERE 
    rn = 1
ORDER BY 
    event_date ASC;

WITH ContractGroups AS (
    SELECT 
        DriverId,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        ContractType,
        CASE 
            WHEN LAG(EndDate, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType ORDER BY StartDate) >= StartDate THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END AS NewGroup
    FROM 
        driverContracts
),
GroupedContracts AS (
    SELECT 
        DriverId,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        ContractType,
        SUM(NewGroup) OVER (PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType ORDER BY StartDate) AS GroupNumber
    FROM 
        ContractGroups
)
SELECT 
    DriverId,
    MIN(StartDate) AS StartDate,
    MAX(EndDate) AS EndDate,
    ContractType
FROM 
    GroupedContracts
GROUP BY 
    DriverId, 
    ContractType, 
    GroupNumber
ORDER BY 
    DriverId, 
    StartDate;

DECLARE @STARTDATE NVARCHAR(100) = '1995-04-04'
DECLARE @ENDDATE NVARCHAR(100) = '1995-04-05'

INSERT INTO #TransTypes
SELECT DISTINCT [type]
FROM trans
WHERE [date] BETWEEN CAST(@STARTDATE AS DATE) AND CAST(@ENDDATE AS DATE)

DECLARE @cols NVARCHAR(MAX) = STUFF(
(
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ', ' + QUOTENAME(TransType)
    FROM #TransTypes
    FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)')
, 1, 2, '')

IF @cols IS NULL OR @cols = ''
BEGIN
    PRINT 'No transaction types found in the specified date range.'
    RETURN
END

DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX) = 
N'
WITH DateRange AS (
    SELECT CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE) + number AS FullDate
    FROM master.dbo.spt_values
    WHERE type = ''P'' 
    AND CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE) + number <= CAST(''' + @ENDDATE + ''' AS DATE)
)
SELECT dr.FullDate AS Date, ' + 
STUFF((
    SELECT ', COALESCE(' + QUOTENAME(TransType) + ', 0) AS ' + QUOTENAME(TransType)
    FROM #TransTypes
    FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 2, '') + 
N'
FROM DateRange dr
LEFT JOIN 
(
    SELECT 
        CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), [date], 120) AS Transaction_Date,
        [type],
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM trans
    WHERE [date] BETWEEN CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE) AND CAST(''' + @ENDDATE + ''' AS DATE)
    GROUP BY CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), [date], 120), [type]
) s
PIVOT
(
    SUM(n)
    FOR [type] IN (' + @cols + ')
) pvt ON dr.FullDate = CAST(pvt.Transaction_Date AS DATE)
ORDER BY dr.FullDate;
'
DROP TABLE #TransTypes
EXEC sp_executesql @sql

DECLARE @info NVARCHAR(100) = '{"client_id":1,"gender":"F"}';
DECLARE @tempTable TABLE (id INT, jsonData NVARCHAR(MAX));

INSERT INTO @tempTable (id, jsonData)
VALUES (1, @info);

BEGIN TRY
    IF (ISJSON((SELECT jsonData FROM @tempTable WHERE id = 1)) > 0)
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @gender NVARCHAR(1) = JSON_VALUE((SELECT jsonData FROM @tempTable WHERE id = 1), '$.gender');
        
        IF @gender IS NOT NULL AND @gender = 'F'
        BEGIN
            UPDATE @tempTable
            SET jsonData = JSON_MODIFY(jsonData, '$.gender', 'M')
            WHERE id = 1;
        END
        ELSE IF @gender IS NULL
        BEGIN
            UPDATE @tempTable
            SET jsonData = JSON_MODIFY(jsonData, 'append $.gender', 'M')
            WHERE id = 1;
        END
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        THROW 50000, 'Invalid JSON', 1;
    END
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
    DECLARE @errorMessage NVARCHAR(100) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
    SET @info = JSON_MODIFY(@info, '$.error', @errorMessage);
END CATCH
SELECT @info AS info;

WITH SchemaInfo AS (
    SELECT
        COLUMN_NAME,
        DATA_TYPE,
        ORDINAL_POSITION
    FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'schools' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = SCHEMA_NAME()
),
SATData AS (
    SELECT
        cds,
        rtype,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY cds ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC) AS RowRank
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumTstTakr > 0
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT 
        COLUMN_NAME AS '@Name', 
        DATA_TYPE AS 'DataType' 
     FROM SchemaInfo 
     ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION 
     FOR XML PATH('Column'), TYPE) AS Columns,
    (SELECT 
        cds, 
        rtype 
     FROM SATData 
     WHERE RowRank = 1 
     FOR XML PATH('Row'), TYPE, ELEMENTS XSINIL) AS Rows
FOR XML PATH('Results'), TYPE;

WITH ZeroConsumptionPeriods AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        CAST(Date AS DATE) AS Date,
        Consumption,
        LAG(Consumption) OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY CAST(Date AS DATE)) AS PrevConsumption,
        LEAD(Consumption) OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY CAST(Date AS DATE)) AS NextConsumption,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY CAST(Date AS DATE)) AS RowNum
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    WHERE 
        Consumption = 0
),
PeriodStarts AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Date AS StartDate,
        RowNum
    FROM 
        ZeroConsumptionPeriods
    WHERE 
        (PrevConsumption IS NULL OR PrevConsumption > 0)
),
PeriodEnds AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Date AS EndDate,
        RowNum
    FROM 
        ZeroConsumptionPeriods
    WHERE 
        (NextConsumption IS NULL OR NextConsumption > 0)
)
SELECT 
    p.CustomerID,
    FORMAT(p.StartDate, 'yyyy-MM') AS StartDate,
    FORMAT(e.EndDate, 'yyyy-MM') AS EndDate
FROM 
    PeriodStarts p
JOIN 
    PeriodEnds e ON p.CustomerID = e.CustomerID AND p.RowNum <= e.RowNum
GROUP BY 
    p.CustomerID, p.StartDate, e.EndDate
ORDER BY 
    p.CustomerID, p.StartDate;

DECLARE @LabResults TABLE(
    ID INT,
    Date DATE,
    GOT INT,
    GPT INT,
    LDH INT
);

INSERT INTO @LabResults
SELECT
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    l.GOT,
    l.GPT,
    CASE
        WHEN l.LDH IS NULL THEN AVG(l.LDH) OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING)
        ELSE l.LDH
    END AS LDH
FROM Laboratory l
INNER JOIN Examination e ON l.ID = e.ID AND l.Date = e.[Examination Date]
WHERE e.Thrombosis = 1
    AND l.Date BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, -3, e.[Examination Date]) AND e.[Examination Date];

INSERT INTO @PatientInfo
SELECT
    p.ID,
    p.SEX,
    p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID IN (SELECT ID FROM @LabResults)
    AND p.Birthday > '1950-01-01';

SELECT
    lr.ID,
    pi.SEX,
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, pi.Birthday, lr.Date) AS Age,
    lr.GOT,
    lr.GPT,
    lr.LDH,
    lr.GOT / NULLIF(lr.GPT, 0) AS Ratio
FROM @LabResults lr
LEFT JOIN @PatientInfo pi ON lr.ID = pi.ID
WHERE lr.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM @LabResults WHERE ID = lr.ID)
ORDER BY lr.Date;

WITH ClientAccountSummary AS (
    SELECT
        cl.client_id,
        cl.gender,
        cl.birth_date,
        d.account_id,
        d.type,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY cl.client_id ORDER BY d.account_id DESC) AS account_rank
    FROM client cl
    LEFT JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = cl.client_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER' OR d.type IS NULL
),
BabyBoomerFlag AS (
    SELECT
        client_id,
        gender,
        CASE
            WHEN DATEPART(year, birth_date) BETWEEN 1948 AND 1960 THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE 'No'
        END as is_baby_boomer
    FROM client
)
SELECT
    c.client_id,
    c.gender,
    b.is_baby_boomer as age_old,
    (SELECT TOP 1 account_id
     FROM disp d2
     WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id AND d2.type = 'OWNER'
     ORDER BY d2.account_id DESC) as last_account
FROM ClientAccountSummary c
JOIN BabyBoomerFlag b ON b.client_id = c.client_id
GROUP BY
    c.client_id,
    c.gender,
    b.is_baby_boomer;

WITH RequiredQtyCTE AS (
    SELECT SUM(qty) AS TotalRequiredQty
    FROM Experiment
    WHERE mid = 2
)
SELECT e.exp_id, e.mid, 
       CASE 
           WHEN i.qty >= (SELECT TotalRequiredQty FROM RequiredQtyCTE) THEN 1
           ELSE 0
       END AS Executable
FROM Experiment e
JOIN Inventory i ON i.mid = e.mid
WHERE e.mid = 2;

SELECT event.event_id, event.event_name, COALESCE(attendees.attendances, '') AS attendances, COALESCE(categories.budget_category, '') AS budget_category
FROM event
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_event, STRING_AGG(link_to_member, ';') AS attendances
    FROM attendance
    GROUP BY link_to_event
) AS attendees ON event.event_id = attendees.link_to_event
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT link_to_event, STRING_AGG(category, ';') AS budget_category
    FROM budget
    GROUP BY link_to_event
) AS categories ON event.event_id = categories.link_to_event;

CREATE OR ALTER FUNCTION [dbo].[fnGetTeamAverageHeight] (@team_api_id INT) RETURNS FLOAT AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @averageHeight FLOAT
    SELECT @averageHeight = AVG(height) 
    FROM Player 
    WHERE player_api_id IN (
        SELECT player_api_id 
        FROM Player_Attributes 
        WHERE player_api_id IN (
            SELECT player_api_id 
            FROM Team_Attributes 
            WHERE team_api_id = @team_api_id
        )
    )
    RETURN @averageHeight
END

SELECT 
    name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN value END) AS name1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN value END) AS name2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN value END) AS name3,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 4 THEN value END) AS name4
FROM (
    SELECT 
        name,
        value,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
    FROM 
        races
    CROSS APPLY 
        STRING_SPLIT(name, ' ')
) AS SplitData
GROUP BY 
    name;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Patient_ID) AS UniquePatientCombinations FROM Record;

DECLARE @StartDate datetime

FROM Team_Attributes

WITH vt AS (
    SELECT TransactionID, CustomerID, StartDate, EndDate,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY StartDate) AS seqnum
    FROM transactions_1k
),
flagged_transactions AS (
    SELECT TransactionID, CustomerID, StartDate, EndDate, seqnum,
           CASE WHEN seqnum = 1 THEN 0 ELSE NULL END AS flag
    FROM vt
)
UPDATE flagged_transactions
SET flag = 1
WHERE seqnum > 1
AND StartDate <= DATEADD(day, 90, (
    SELECT MAX(StartDate)
    FROM flagged_transactions ft2
    WHERE ft2.CustomerID = flagged_transactions.CustomerID
    AND ft2.flag = 0
    AND ft2.StartDate < flagged_transactions.StartDate
));

SELECT *
FROM budget
WHERE link_to_event = 'recggMW2eyCYceNcy'
  AND category BETWEEN 'Food' AND 'Speaker Gifts'
ORDER BY category;

DECLARE db_update_cursor CURSOR FOR
    SELECT TOP 2 ID, Date
    FROM Laboratory ORDER BY ID, Date

OPEN db_update_cursor
FETCH NEXT FROM db_update_cursor INTO @ID, @Date

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        SELECT @json = (SELECT @ID AS ID, @Date AS Date FOR JSON AUTO)
        INSERT INTO destinationTable(testRow)
        VALUES (@json)
        FETCH NEXT FROM db_update_cursor INTO @ID, @Date
    END

CLOSE db_update_cursor
DEALLOCATE db_update_cursor

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT payments) < 2 OR MIN(payments) = MAX(payments) THEN NULL
        ELSE (
            SELECT payments 
            FROM (
                SELECT payments, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY payments DESC) AS rank
                FROM loan
            ) AS ranked_payments
            WHERE rank = 2
        )
    END AS second_highest_payment
FROM loan;

UPDATE loan
SET source_account_id = mapping1.user_id_version_2,
    target_account_id = mapping2.user_id_version_2
FROM loan
CROSS APPLY (
    SELECT user_id_version_2
    FROM user_id_mapping
    WHERE user_id_mapping.user_id_version_1 = loan.source_account_id
) AS mapping1
CROSS APPLY (
    SELECT user_id_version_2
    FROM user_id_mapping
    WHERE user_id_mapping.user_id_version_1 = loan.target_account_id
) AS mapping2;

WITH StatusGroups AS (
    SELECT loan_id, account_id, date, status,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY date) - 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY account_id, status ORDER BY date) AS grp
    FROM loan
),
StatusCounts AS (
    SELECT grp, COUNT(*) AS status_1_count
    FROM StatusGroups
    WHERE status = 1
    GROUP BY grp
)
SELECT sg.loan_id, sg.account_id, sg.date, sg.status, sc.status_1_count
FROM StatusGroups sg
LEFT JOIN StatusCounts sc ON sg.grp = sc.grp
ORDER BY sg.account_id, sg.date;

SELECT

        WHEN s.id = 2 THEN 2

    END AS order_column,
    s.superhero_name, 
    p.publisher_name 
FROM 
    superhero s 
JOIN

WHERE

ORDER BY

SELECT 
    clamped_time,
    MIN(amount) AS Low,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN amount END) AS [Open]
FROM (
    SELECT 
        [date],
        amount,
        DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5 * 5, 0) AS clamped_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5 * 5, 0) ORDER BY [date]) AS rn
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = 1
) AS subquery
GROUP BY clamped_time;

DECLARE @InputString NVARCHAR(MAX) = '1.25,5.34,6.9';
DECLARE @Var1 FLOAT, @Var2 FLOAT, @Var3 FLOAT;

-- Create a table variable to hold the split values
DECLARE @SplitValues TABLE (Value NVARCHAR(MAX), RowNum INT);

-- Insert the split values into the table variable with row numbers
INSERT INTO @SplitValues (Value, RowNum)
SELECT value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL))
FROM STRING_SPLIT(@InputString, ',');

-- Output the variables to verify
SELECT @Var1 AS Var1, @Var2 AS Var2, @Var3 AS Var3;

WITH SplitPlayerIDs AS (
    SELECT
        pa.id,
        value AS player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(CAST(pa.player_api_id AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), ',')
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    spa.id,

    spa.player_api_id

INNER JOIN Player p
ON spa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id;

INNER JOIN circuits c ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
WHERE c.country LIKE 'M%'
AND c.name NOT LIKE '%International%';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN RowNum <= 3 THEN name 
        ELSE 'Others' 
    END AS name,
    SUM(Prints) AS Prints
FROM (
    SELECT 
        name,
        COUNT(printings) AS Prints,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(printings) DESC) AS RowNum
    FROM cards
    GROUP BY name
) AS CardPrints
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN RowNum <= 3 THEN name 
        ELSE 'Others' 
    END,
    CASE 
        WHEN RowNum <= 3 THEN RowNum 
        ELSE 4 
    END
ORDER BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN name = 'Others' THEN 4 
        ELSE RowNum 
    END;

WITH AtomSequence AS (
    SELECT 
        a.atom_id,
        a.element,
        c.bond_id,
        1 AS sequence_num
    FROM 
        atom a
    JOIN 
        connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE 
        a.molecule_id = 'TR000'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        a.atom_id,
        a.element,
        c.bond_id,
        as.sequence_num + 1
    FROM 
        AtomSequence as
    JOIN 
        connected c ON as.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    JOIN 
        atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
    WHERE 
        a.molecule_id = 'TR000'
)
SELECT 
    atom_id,
    element,
    bond_id,
    sequence_num
FROM 
    AtomSequence
ORDER BY 
    sequence_num;

WITH hero_activity AS
  (SELECT id,
          activity_date,
          activity_value,
          hero_id
   FROM (
         VALUES (1,
                 '2023-01-01',
                 10,
                 1), (2,
                      '2023-01-02',
                      20,
                      1), (3,
                           '2023-02-01',
                           15,
                           1), (4,
                                '2023-02-02',
                                25,
                                1), (5,
                                     '2023-01-03',
                                     30,
                                     2), (6,
                                          '2023-02-03',
                                          40,
                                          2)) AS t (id, activity_date, activity_value, hero_id)),
     monthly_totals AS
  (SELECT YEAR(activity_date) AS year,
          MONTH(activity_date) AS month,
          SUM(activity_value) AS m_run_tot
   FROM hero_activity
   GROUP BY YEAR(activity_date), MONTH(activity_date)),
     activity_totals AS
  (SELECT id,
          activity_date,
          activity_value,
          SUM(activity_value) OVER (
                                    ORDER BY activity_date) AS run_tot,
                                   m_run_tot
   FROM hero_activity
   JOIN monthly_totals ON YEAR(activity_date) = monthly_totals.year AND MONTH(activity_date) = monthly_totals.month)
SELECT id,
       activity_date,
       activity_value,
       run_tot,
       m_run_tot,
       LAG(m_run_tot) OVER (ORDER BY YEAR(activity_date), MONTH(activity_date)) AS prev_m_run_tot
FROM activity_totals
ORDER BY activity_date;

SELECT
    r.raceId,
    r.name AS raceName,
    c.name AS circuitName,
    d.forename AS driverForename,
    d.surname AS driverSurname,
    co.name AS constructorName,
    res.position AS finishPosition,
    res.points,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.year ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS seasonRanking,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.constructorId ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS constructorDriverRank,
    CASE
        WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.constructorId ORDER BY res.points DESC) = 1 THEN 'Primary'
        ELSE 'Secondary'
    END AS driverStatus
FROM races AS r
INNER JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
INNER JOIN results AS res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
INNER JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
INNER JOIN constructors AS co ON res.constructorId = co.constructorId
WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    r.raceId,
    res.position;

SELECT a1.atom_id AS atom_id1,
       a2.atom_id AS atom_id2,
       c.bond_id,
       b.bond_type
FROM atom AS a1
INNER JOIN connected AS c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY a1.atom_id,
         a2.atom_id;

SELECT ID, [Date], 
       CASE 
           WHEN GOT IS NULL THEN MostRecentGOT
           ELSE GOT
       END AS NEW_GOT
FROM (
    SELECT ID, [Date], GOT,
           FIRST_VALUE(GOT) OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY [Date] DESC) AS MostRecentGOT
    FROM Laboratory
) AS NonNullGOT
ORDER BY ID, [Date];

WITH PatientExamData AS (
    SELECT
        P.ID AS PATIENTID,
        P.SEX,
        P.BIRTHDAY,
        E.[Examination Date],
        E.THROMBOSIS
    FROM PATIENT AS P
    LEFT JOIN EXAMINATION AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
)
SELECT
    PATIENTID,
    SEX,
    BIRTHDAY,
    COUNT([Examination Date]) AS EXAMINATIONCOUNT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THROMBOSISCOUNT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOTHROMBOSISCOUNT
FROM PatientExamData
GROUP BY
    PATIENTID,
    SEX,
    BIRTHDAY
HAVING COUNT([Examination Date]) > 0
ORDER BY
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC,
    PATIENTID;

WITH data AS (
    SELECT
        county,
        cdscode,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY cdscode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools
)
SELECT
    a.cdscode AS cdscode1,
    a.county AS county1,
    b.cdscode AS cdscode2,
    b.county AS county2
FROM data AS a
INNER JOIN data AS b ON
    a.county = b.county AND
    b.rnk = a.rnk + 1
WHERE a.rnk % 2 = 1;

SELECT
    a1.molecule_id,
    a1.atom_id AS atom1_id,
    a1.element AS atom1_element,
    a2.atom_id AS atom2_id,
    a2.element AS atom2_element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM
    atom AS a1
INNER JOIN
    connected AS c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN
    atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
LEFT JOIN
    bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE
    (b.bond_type IS NOT NULL OR c.bond_id IS NULL)
    AND a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
ORDER BY
    a1.molecule_id,
    a1.atom_id,
    a2.atom_id;

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label AS molecule_label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element AS atom_element,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM molecule AS m
INNER JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    c.bond_id;

SELECT *
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule_id NOT IN ('TR000', 'TR001', 'TR002')
   OR molecule_id IS NULL;

    COUNT(DISTINCT CAST([date] AS DATE)) AS distinct_days
FROM 
    rulings
GROUP BY 
    FORMAT([date], 'yyyy-MM')
ORDER BY

ALTER TABLE superhero ADD height_cm INT, weight_kg INT;

WITH RowNumbers AS (
    SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS rn
    FROM superhero
)
UPDATE superhero
SET height_cm = rn, weight_kg = rn
FROM superhero

WITH PatientExamHistory AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        p.SEX,
        p.Birthday,
        p.Description,
        p.[First Date],
        p.Admission,
        p.Diagnosis AS PatientDiagnosis,
        e.[Examination Date],
        e.[aCL IgG],
        e.[aCL IgM],
        e.ANA,
        e.[ANA Pattern],
        e.[aCL IgA],
        e.Diagnosis AS ExamDiagnosis,
        e.KCT,
        e.RVVT,
        e.LAC,
        e.Symptoms,
        e.Thrombosis,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID ORDER BY e.[Examination Date] DESC) AS ExamRank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID) AS ExamCount
    FROM Patient AS p
    LEFT JOIN Examination AS e ON e.ID = p.ID
    LEFT JOIN Laboratory AS l ON l.ID = p.ID AND l.Date = e.[Examination Date]
    WHERE (p.SEX = 'F' OR e.Thrombosis = 1)
),
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.WBC,
        l.RBC,
        l.HGB,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LabRank
    FROM Laboratory AS l
)
SELECT
    peh.*,
    llr.WBC,
    llr.RBC,
    llr.HGB,
    CASE
        WHEN peh.ExamCount > 1 THEN 'Multiple Exams'
        WHEN peh.ExamCount = 1 THEN 'Single Exam'
        ELSE 'No Exams'
    END AS ExamStatus
FROM PatientExamHistory peh
LEFT JOIN LatestLabResults llr ON llr.ID = peh.ID AND llr.LabRank = 1
WHERE peh.ExamRank = 1 OR peh.ExamRank IS NULL
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN peh.Thrombosis = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    peh.ID;

WITH LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
        l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
        l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
        l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
        l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LatestRank
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
)
SELECT
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
    l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
    l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
    l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
    l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II]
FROM LatestLabResults l
WHERE l.LatestRank = 1
ORDER BY l.ID;

WITH LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
        l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
        l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
        l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
        l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LatestRank
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
)
SELECT
    llr.ID,
    llr.Date,
    llr.GOT, llr.GPT, llr.LDH, llr.ALP, llr.TP, llr.ALB, llr.UA, llr.UN, llr.CRE,
    llr.[T-BIL], llr.[T-CHO], llr.TG, llr.CPK, llr.GLU, llr.WBC, llr.RBC, llr.HGB,
    llr.HCT, llr.PLT, llr.PT, llr.APTT, llr.FG, llr.[U-PRO], llr.IGG, llr.IGA, llr.IGM,
