    llr.CRP, llr.RA, llr.RF, llr.C3, llr.C4, llr.RNP, llr.SM, llr.SC170, llr.SSA, llr.SSB,
    llr.CENTROMEA, llr.DNA, llr.[DNA-II]
FROM LatestLabResults llr
WHERE llr.LatestRank = 1
ORDER BY llr.ID;

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.date,
        res.driverId,
        res.points,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId, r.year ORDER BY r.date) AS SeasonRaceNumber,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId ORDER BY r.year, r.date) AS CareerRaceNumber
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (
    SELECT
        driverId,
        year,
        raceId,
        points,
        SeasonRaceNumber,
        CareerRaceNumber,
        CASE 
            WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 1 THEN 1
            WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN 2
            WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 3 THEN 3
            WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 4 THEN 4
            WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 5 THEN 5
            ELSE NULL
        END AS RacePosition
    FROM RaceResults
    WHERE SeasonRaceNumber <= 5
)
SELECT
    d.driverId,
    d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS DriverName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RacePosition = 1 THEN points END) AS Race1_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RacePosition = 2 THEN points END) AS Race2_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RacePosition = 3 THEN points END) AS Race3_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RacePosition = 4 THEN points END) AS Race4_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RacePosition = 5 THEN points END) AS Race5_Points
FROM DriverFirstFiveRaces r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY d.surname, d.forename;

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.name AS raceName,
        res.positionText,
        d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS driverName,
        res.driverId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.positionText ORDER BY res.resultId) AS position_rank
    FROM results res
    INNER JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE res.positionText IN ('1', '2', '3')
)
SELECT
    rr.raceId,
    MAX(rr.year) AS year,
    MAX(rr.raceName) AS raceName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position1_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position2_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position3_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position3
FROM RaceResults rr
WHERE position_rank = 1
GROUP BY rr.raceId
ORDER BY MAX(rr.year) DESC;

WITH x AS (
    SELECT 
        driverid,
        statusid,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY driverid ORDER BY COUNT(statusid) DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        results
    GROUP BY 
        driverid,
        statusid
),
driver_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        driverid,
        MAX(position) AS position,
        MAX(positionText) AS positionText,
        MAX(positionOrder) AS positionOrder,
        MAX(points) AS points,
        MAX(laps) AS laps
    FROM 
        results
    GROUP BY 
        driverid
)
INSERT INTO results (resultId, raceId, driverId, constructorId, number, grid, position, positionText, positionOrder, points, laps, time, milliseconds, fastestLap, rank, fastestLapTime, fastestLapSpeed, statusId)
SELECT 
    CHECKSUM(NEWID()) AS resultId,
    (SELECT MIN(raceId) FROM races) AS raceId,
    x.driverid,
    1 AS constructorId,
    1 AS number,
    1 AS grid,
    ds.position,
    ds.positionText,
    ds.positionOrder,
    ds.points,
    ds.laps,
    '00:00:00' AS time,
    0 AS milliseconds,
    1 AS fastestLap,
    1 AS rank,
    '00:00:00' AS fastestLapTime,
    '000.000' AS fastestLapSpeed,
    x.statusid
FROM 
    x
JOIN 
    driver_stats ds ON x.driverid = ds.driverid
WHERE 
    x.rn = 1;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT code) > 1 THEN 
            CAST(MIN(code) AS NVARCHAR) + '-' + CAST(MAX(code) AS NVARCHAR)
        ELSE 
            CAST(MAX(code) AS NVARCHAR)
    END AS concat_codes
FROM 
    drivers
WHERE 
    code IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
    COALESCE(nationality, 'Unknown') AS nationality,
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT code) > 1 THEN
            MIN(code) + '-' + MAX(code)
        ELSE
            MAX(code)
    END AS concat_codes
FROM
    drivers
WHERE
    code IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    COALESCE(nationality, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY
    COALESCE(nationality, 'Unknown');

WITH TeamAverages AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(CAST(BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgBuildupplaySpeed,
        AVG(CAST(DEFENCETEAMWIDTH AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES
    WHERE BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL
    AND DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    TA.ID,
    TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    TA.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    TA.CHANCECREATIONPASSING,
    TA.CHANCECREATIONCROSSING,
    TA.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    TA.DEFENCEPRESSURE,
    TA.DEFENCEAGGRESSION,
    TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH
FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES AS TA
JOIN TeamAverages AS AVG ON 1=1
WHERE TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED > AVG.AvgBuildupplaySpeed
AND TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH < AVG.AvgDefenceTeamWidth
ORDER BY TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED DESC, TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH ASC;

SELECT
    TA.ID,
    TA.team_api_id,
    TA.date,
    TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    TA.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    TA.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
    LEAD(TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS NextBuildupplaySpeed,
    LEAD(TA.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS NextBuildupplayPassing,
    LAG(TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS PreviousDefenceTeamWidth,
    LAG(TA.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS PreviousChanceCreationShooting,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id) AS RecordCount
FROM
    TEAM_ATTRIBUTES AS TA
WHERE
    TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL
    AND TA.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING IS NOT NULL
    AND TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
    AND TA.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    TA.team_api_id, TA.date;

SELECT
    p.ID,
    p.SEX,
    p.Diagnosis,
    CASE
        WHEN p.[First Date] IS NOT NULL AND p.[First Date] < MIN(l.Date)
        THEN p.[First Date]
        ELSE MIN(l.Date)
    END AS earliest_test_date
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.Date >= p.[First Date] OR p.[First Date] IS NULL
GROUP BY p.ID, p.SEX, p.Diagnosis, p.[First Date]
HAVING MIN(l.Date) IS NOT NULL;

WITH cte AS
  (SELECT id,
          [Examination Date],
          thrombosis,
          risklag = LAG(thrombosis, 1, thrombosis) OVER (PARTITION BY id
                                                         ORDER BY [Examination Date]),
          rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id,
                                                 YEAR([Examination Date]),
                                                 MONTH([Examination Date])
                                                ORDER BY [Examination Date] DESC)
   FROM examination)
SELECT id,
       startofmonth = CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, [Examination Date]), 0)),
       increase_risk = CASE
                           WHEN CAST(risklag AS INT) < CAST(thrombosis AS INT) THEN 'Yes'
                           ELSE 'No'
                       END,
       decrease_risk = CASE
                           WHEN CAST(risklag AS INT) > CAST(thrombosis AS INT) THEN 'Yes'
                           ELSE 'No'
                       END
FROM cte
WHERE rn = 1

WITH x AS (
    SELECT FLOOR(COALESCE(LEN(label), 0) / 100) AS labellength
    FROM [molecule]
)
SELECT labellength * 100 AS labellengthstart,
       (labellength + 1) * 100 - 1 AS labellengthend,
       COUNT(*) AS moleculecount
FROM x
GROUP BY labellength
ORDER BY labellength;

WITH t AS
  (SELECT e.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id
                             ORDER BY e.[Examination Date]) AS seqnum
   FROM examination AS e),
     cte AS
  (SELECT t.id,
          t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
          t.seqnum,
          'N' AS isrehire,
          t.[Examination Date] AS anchordate
   FROM t
   WHERE t.seqnum = 1
   UNION ALL SELECT t.id,
                    t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
                    t.seqnum,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                    END AS isrehire,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN t.[Examination Date]
                        ELSE cte.anchordate
                    END AS anchordate
   FROM cte
   INNER JOIN t ON cte.id = t.id AND t.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1)
SELECT id,
       startdate,
       seqnum,
       isrehire
FROM cte
ORDER BY id,
         startdate;

SELECT *
FROM
(
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY label) AS item,
        CONCAT(label, ' (', tag1, ')') AS value
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            id,
            name,
            'Colors' AS label,
            colors   AS tag1
        FROM cards
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            id,
            name,
            'ManaCost' AS label,
            manacost   AS tag1
        FROM cards
    ) AS src
) AS src
PIVOT
(
    MAX(value)
    FOR item IN ([1], [2])
) AS pvt
WHERE id = '1';

WITH T_period_futur AS
  (SELECT 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
          CAST('2021-10-25' AS DATE) AS Tpf_start_period
   UNION ALL SELECT Tpf_period_id + 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
                    DATEADD(WEEK, 1, Tpf_start_period)
   FROM T_period_futur
   WHERE Tpf_period_id < 12 )
SELECT Tpf_period_id,
       Tpf_start_period,
       YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_year,
       CAST(YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS VARCHAR) + '.' + RIGHT('00' + CAST(DATEPART(WK, Tpf_start_period) AS VARCHAR), 2) AS Tpf_period_number,
       DATEADD(DAY, 6, Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_end_period
FROM T_period_futur;

SELECT 
    p.ID AS PatientID,
    p.Diagnosis,
    COALESCE(e.Thrombosis, 0) AS ThrombosisStatus
FROM 
    Patient p
LEFT JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
ORDER BY 
    p.ID;

WITH TEAMATTRS AS
  (SELECT BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS VALUE,
          'Team_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) AS RN
   FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES)
SELECT PLAYERATTRS.VALUE AS Player_Value,
       PLAYERATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS Player_Identifier,
       TEAMATTRS.VALUE AS Team_Value,
       TEAMATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS Team_Identifier
FROM
  (SELECT OVERALL_RATING AS VALUE,
          'Player_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY OVERALL_RATING) AS RN
   FROM PLAYER_ATTRIBUTES) AS PLAYERATTRS
INNER JOIN TEAMATTRS ON PLAYERATTRS.RN = TEAMATTRS.RN;

SELECT
    DATEADD(DAY, -DATEPART(WEEKDAY, originalreleasedate) + 1, originalreleasedate) AS start_of_week,
    COUNT(*) AS card_count
FROM cards
WHERE originalreleasedate IS NOT NULL
  AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, originalreleasedate) IS NOT NULL
  AND originalreleasedate >= '2007-01-01'
GROUP BY DATEADD(DAY, -DATEPART(WEEKDAY, originalreleasedate) + 1, originalreleasedate)
ORDER BY start_of_week;

SELECT 
    [date],
    home_team_api_id AS group_1,
    away_team_api_id AS group_2,
    home_team_goal AS daily_profits,
    SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, [date]), DATEPART(MONTH, [date]), home_team_api_id, away_team_api_id ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS mtd,
    SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, [date]), DATEPART(QUARTER, [date]), home_team_api_id, away_team_api_id ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS qtd,
    SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, [date]), home_team_api_id, away_team_api_id ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ytd,
    SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id, away_team_api_id ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ltd
FROM 
    [Match]
ORDER BY 
    [date],
    home_team_api_id,
    away_team_api_id;

SELECT
    c.name AS card_name,
    l.format,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Legal' THEN l.id END) AS legal_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Banned' THEN l.id END) AS banned_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Legal' THEN l.id END) - MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Banned' THEN l.id END) AS id_diff
FROM cards AS c
LEFT JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE l.format IN ('commander', 'duel', 'legacy')
GROUP BY c.name, l.format
ORDER BY c.name ASC, l.format ASC;

WITH a AS
  (SELECT id,
          date AS applicationid,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id
                             ORDER BY date) AS rn,
          LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY id
                                            ORDER BY date) AS prev
   FROM laboratory)
SELECT id AS usercode,
       prev AS PreviousLabDate,
       applicationid AS CurrentLabDate,
       rn AS LabSequence
FROM a;

SELECT RACEID,
       NAME,
       [date],
       COALESCE(CAST(LAG(RACEID) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR
                                       ORDER BY [date]) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), 'First Race') AS PREVRACEID,
       COALESCE(CAST(LEAD(RACEID) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR
                                        ORDER BY [date]) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), 'Last Race') AS NEXTRACEID
FROM RACES
ORDER BY YEAR,
         [date];

WITH pages AS
  (SELECT 1 AS page_id,
          1 AS power_id
   UNION ALL SELECT 1,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 2,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    89
   UNION ALL SELECT 4,
                    20
   UNION ALL SELECT 5,
                    55
   UNION ALL SELECT 5,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 6,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 6,
                    13),
     items AS
  (SELECT 10 AS hero_id,
          1 AS power_id
   UNION ALL SELECT 10,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 10,
                    20
   UNION ALL SELECT 12,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 12,
                    55)
SELECT p.page_id,
       p.hero_id
FROM
  (SELECT p.page_id,
          i.hero_id,
          COUNT(i.power_id) AS matching_powers
   FROM pages AS p
   INNER JOIN items AS i ON p.power_id = i.power_id
   GROUP BY p.page_id, i.hero_id) AS p
INNER JOIN
  (SELECT page_id,
          COUNT(power_id) AS total_powers
   FROM pages
   GROUP BY page_id) AS t ON p.page_id = t.page_id
WHERE p.matching_powers >= t.total_powers;

WITH data AS
  (SELECT p.id,
          p.[First Date] AS as_of_date,
          p.diagnosis AS current_diagnosis,
          LAG(p.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY p.id
                                 ORDER BY p.[First Date]) AS prev_diagnosis,
          CASE
              WHEN p.diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE') THEN 1
              ELSE 0
          END AS output_flag
   FROM patient AS p)
SELECT as_of_date,
       id,
       current_diagnosis,
       prev_diagnosis,
       CASE
           WHEN output_flag = 1 THEN MIN(as_of_date) OVER (PARTITION BY id, output_flag
                                                          ORDER BY as_of_date)
       END AS desired_output
FROM data
WHERE (current_diagnosis <> prev_diagnosis OR prev_diagnosis IS NULL)
  AND output_flag = 1;

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS
  (SELECT P.ID,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Aaron') + '%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Aaron'
          END AS COLAKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Cresswell') + '%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Cresswell'
          END AS COLBKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Doran') + '%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Doran'
          END AS COLCKEYWORD
   FROM PLAYER AS P),
     KEYWORDSCORES AS
  (SELECT ID,
          STUFF(
                  (SELECT ', ' + COLAKEYWORD
                   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS INNERKM
                   WHERE INNERKM.ID = KM.ID
                     AND COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
                     FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 2, '') AS KEYWORDSA,
          STUFF(
                  (SELECT ', ' + COLBKEYWORD
                   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS INNERKM
                   WHERE INNERKM.ID = KM.ID
                     AND COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
                     FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 2, '') AS KEYWORDSB,
          STUFF(
                  (SELECT ', ' + COLCKEYWORD
                   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS INNERKM
                   WHERE INNERKM.ID = KM.ID
                     AND COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
                     FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 2, '') AS KEYWORDSC,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 10
                  ELSE 0
              END) AS COLASCORE,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 5
                  ELSE 0
              END) AS COLBSCORE,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 0.1
                  ELSE 0
              END) AS COLCSCORE
   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS KM
   GROUP BY ID)
SELECT DISTINCT P.ID,
                P.PLAYER_NAME AS DESCRIPTION,
                (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) AS SCORE
FROM PLAYER AS P
INNER JOIN KEYWORDSCORES AS KS ON P.ID = KS.ID
ORDER BY KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE DESC;

WITH ATOMRNS AS
  (SELECT MOLECULE_ID,
          ELEMENT,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MOLECULE_ID
                             ORDER BY ATOM_ID) AS RN
   FROM ATOM)
SELECT MOLECULE_ID,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 1 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT1,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 2 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT2,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 3 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT3
FROM ATOMRNS
GROUP BY MOLECULE_ID;

WITH SuperheroList AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        SUPERHERO_NAME,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID) AS RowNum
    FROM SUPERHERO
)
SELECT
    S1.SUPERHERO_NAME AS CURRENTSUPERHERO,
    S2.SUPERHERO_NAME AS SUPERHEROAFTER4
FROM SuperheroList AS S1
LEFT JOIN SuperheroList AS S2
    ON S2.RowNum = S1.RowNum + 4
ORDER BY S1.RowNum;

SELECT num
FROM
  (SELECT number AS num,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY number
                                                               ORDER BY id) AS grp
   FROM cards
   WHERE number LIKE '%[0-9]%' AND number NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%') AS a
GROUP BY grp, num
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;

WITH DistinctBondMolecules AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM bond
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) > 1
),
RankedBonds AS (
    SELECT molecule_id, bond_type,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY bond_type) AS rn
    FROM bond
    WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM DistinctBondMolecules)
)
SELECT molecule_id, bond_type
FROM RankedBonds
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY molecule_id;

SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(e."type") AS "type",
    MAX(e."event_date") AS latest_event_date
FROM 
    "event" e
GROUP BY 
    TO_CHAR(e."type")

select "element", "record"
    from "frpm_record"
    union all
    select
        substr("element", 1, instr("element", '_') - 1) || '_rate' as element,
        max(case when substr("element", instr("element", '_') + 1) = 'highgrade' then "record" end) /
        max(case when substr("element", instr("element", '_') + 1) = 'lowgrade' then "record" end) as "record"
    from "frpm_record"
    group by substr("element", 1, instr("element", '_') - 1)

SELECT pr."id", pr."date", pr."overall_rating"
FROM (
    SELECT "id", "date", "overall_rating",
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) AS rn
    FROM "Player_Rate"
) pr
WHERE pr.rn = 1

MERGE INTO "frpm" target
USING (
    SELECT "CDSCode" 
    FROM "frpm" 
    WHERE "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" >= 0.5
) source
ON (target."CDSCode" = source."CDSCode")
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE 
SET target."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1000

SELECT 
    "id", 
    "date", 
    "home_team_goal", 
    LAG("home_team_goal") OVER (ORDER BY "date" ASC) AS prev_home_goal 
FROM "Match" 
WHERE "date" <= TO_DATE('2024-02-26', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

MERGE INTO "school_record" tab2
    USING (
        SELECT "CDSCode" FROM "charter_school" WHERE "Charter School (Y/N)" = '1'
    ) tab1
    ON (tab1."CDSCode" = tab2."CDSCode")
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT ("CDSCode") VALUES (tab1."CDSCode")

SELECT 
  SUBSTR("first_name", 1, 1) || 
  LPAD('•', GREATEST(LENGTH("first_name") - 2, 0), '•') || 
  SUBSTR("first_name", -1, 1) AS masked_first_name,
  SUBSTR("last_name", 1, 1) || 
  LPAD('•', GREATEST(LENGTH("last_name") - 2, 0), '•') || 
  SUBSTR("last_name", -1, 1) AS masked_last_name 
FROM "member"

SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT "atom_id", "bond_id",
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "atom_id" ORDER BY "bond_id") as bond_order
    FROM "connected"
)
PIVOT (
    MAX("bond_id")
    FOR bond_order IN (1 AS "bond_id_1", 2 AS "bond_id_2", 3 AS "bond_id_3")
)
ORDER BY "atom_id"

WITH member_data AS (
    SELECT
        "member_id",
        "member_name",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "member_id" ORDER BY "member_name") AS rn
    FROM "member_trunc"
),
tokenized_members AS (
    SELECT
        a."link_to_event",
        LEVEL AS position,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL) AS member_token
    FROM "attendance_trunc" a
    CONNECT BY
        PRIOR a.ROWID = a.ROWID AND
        PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL AND
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL
),
member_names AS (
    SELECT
        tm."link_to_event",
        tm.position,
        COALESCE(md."member_name", 'Unknown Member') AS member_name
    FROM tokenized_members tm
    LEFT JOIN member_data md ON (tm.member_token = md."member_id" AND md.rn = 1)
)
SELECT
    mn."link_to_event",
    LISTAGG(mn.member_name, '|') WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY CASE
                    WHEN mn.position IS NULL THEN 9999
                    ELSE mn.position
                 END
    ) AS replaced_members
FROM member_names mn
GROUP BY mn."link_to_event"
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mn.position) > 0
ORDER BY mn."link_to_event"

DELETE FROM "atom"
WHERE "molecule_id" IN (
    SELECT "molecule_id"
    FROM "molecule"
    WHERE DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("label", 4000, 1) = '-'
)
AND DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("element", 4000, 1) <> 'cl'

SELECT "cds", 
       TO_CHAR("sname") AS "sname", 
       (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
           JSON_OBJECT(
               'enroll12' VALUE TO_CHAR(t."enroll12"),
               'NumTstTakr' VALUE TO_CHAR(t."NumTstTakr"),
               'AvgScrRead' VALUE TO_CHAR(t."AvgScrRead"),
               'AvgScrMath' VALUE TO_CHAR(t."AvgScrMath"),
               'AvgScrWrite' VALUE TO_CHAR(t."AvgScrWrite")
           )
           ORDER BY t."enroll12" DESC
           RETURNING CLOB
        )
        FROM "satscores" t
        WHERE TO_CHAR(t."rtype") = 'S' 
        AND t."cds" = "satscores"."cds"
       ) AS "SATSummary"
FROM "satscores" 
WHERE TO_CHAR("rtype") = 'S'

WITH OrderedCategories AS (
    SELECT
        SUM("spent") AS category_total,
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("category", 4000) AS category
    FROM "budget"
    GROUP BY DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("category", 4000)
    ORDER BY category DESC
),
Cumulative AS (
    SELECT category_total, category,
           SUM(category_total) OVER (ORDER BY category DESC) AS cumulative_sum
    FROM OrderedCategories
)
SELECT category_total, category
FROM Cumulative
WHERE cumulative_sum <= 850
AND (cumulative_sum - category_total) < 850

SELECT header || ': ' || "name" AS grouped_countries
FROM (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN "name" LIKE 'Country Group%' THEN "name" END)
        OVER (ORDER BY "id") AS header,
        "id",
        "name"
    FROM "Country"
) 
WHERE "name" NOT LIKE 'Country Group%'

SELECT
    DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(e."type", 4000, 1) AS event_type,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e."event_date") = yr.recent_year THEN 1 END) -
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e."event_date") = yr.oldest_year THEN 1 END) AS year_difference
FROM "event" e
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT
        MAX(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date")) AS recent_year,
        MIN(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date")) AS oldest_year
    FROM "event"
) yr
GROUP BY DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(e."type", 4000, 1)

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        LEAST(m1."home_team_api_id", m1."away_team_api_id") AS team1,
        GREATEST(m1."home_team_api_id", m1."away_team_api_id") AS team2
    FROM "Match" m1
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Match" m2
        WHERE m2."home_team_api_id" = m1."away_team_api_id"
        AND m2."away_team_api_id" = m1."home_team_api_id"
    )
)

SELECT player_id,
       "overall_rating",
       "potential",
       "preferred_foot",
       "attacking_work_rate"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        "player_api_id" AS player_id, 
        "overall_rating", 
        "potential", 
        "preferred_foot", 
        "attacking_work_rate", 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "player_api_id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) AS rn 
    FROM "Player_Attributes" 
    WHERE "date" <= DATE '2015-12-31'
) 
WHERE rn = 1

SELECT 
    "District Name" AS DistrictName,
    CASE 
        WHEN INSTR("District Name", 'Unified', 3) > 0 
        THEN INSTR("District Name", 'Unified', 3)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS Position
FROM "frpm"

SELECT DISTINCT * FROM atom_view
WHERE atom_id IN (
    SELECT 'TR000_1' FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'TR000_2' FROM DUAL
)

SELECT "frpm".* 
FROM "frpm" 
LEFT OUTER JOIN "satscores" ON "frpm"."CDSCode" = "satscores"."cds" 
LEFT OUTER JOIN "schools" ON "frpm"."CDSCode" = "schools"."CDSCode" 
WHERE "frpm"."CDSCode" = '01100170112607'
AND "frpm"."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 
AND COALESCE("frpm"."District Code", 0) = 10017

-- First query to get player IDs with their first and last active dates
SELECT
    "player_fifa_api_id" as id,
    MIN("date") AS first_date,
    MAX("date") AS last_date
FROM "Player_Attributes"
GROUP BY "player_fifa_api_id"

-- Second query to get gaps BEFORE the first recorded activity
SELECT
    "player_fifa_api_id" as id,
    DATE '2000-01-01' AS gap_start,
    MIN("date") - 1 AS gap_end
FROM "Player_Attributes"
GROUP BY "player_fifa_api_id"
HAVING MIN("date") > DATE '2000-01-01'

-- Third query to get gaps AFTER the last recorded activity
SELECT
    "player_fifa_api_id" as id,
    MAX("date") + 1 AS gap_start,
    DATE '2025-12-31' AS gap_end
FROM "Player_Attributes"
GROUP BY "player_fifa_api_id"
HAVING MAX("date") < DATE '2025-12-31'

SELECT * FROM "event"
WHERE "status" != 'Closed'
ORDER BY "event_date"
OFFSET 10 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

SELECT e."event_id", b."amount", a."link_to_member", a."link_to_event"
    FROM "event" e
    JOIN "budget" b ON e."event_id" = b."link_to_event"
    LEFT JOIN "attendance" a ON e."event_id" = a."link_to_event"
    ORDER BY e."event_id"

SELECT sh."id" AS superhero_id,
       sh."superhero_name",
       a."alignment" AS moral_alignment
FROM "superhero" sh
JOIN "alignment" a ON sh."alignment_id" = a."id"
WHERE DBMS_LOB.INSTR(a."alignment", 'Good') > 0

SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(week_start, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS eventdate,
    userid,
    total_traffic,
    most_frequent_location
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TRUNC(eventdate, 'IW') AS week_start,
        userid,
        SUM(traffic) AS total_traffic,
        FIRST_VALUE(location) OVER (
            PARTITION BY TRUNC(eventdate, 'IW'), userid 
            ORDER BY COUNT(location) DESC
        ) AS most_frequent_location,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY TRUNC(eventdate, 'IW'), userid 
            ORDER BY TRUNC(eventdate, 'IW')
        ) AS rn
    FROM SCHOOL_EVENTS
    GROUP BY TRUNC(eventdate, 'IW'), userid, location
)
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY week_start, userid

MERGE INTO "RECORD" r
USING (
    SELECT ROWID AS rid, SYS_GUID() AS uuid 
    FROM "RECORD"
) s ON (r.ROWID = s.rid)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET r.R1 = s.uuid, r.R2 = s.uuid

INSERT INTO "GROUPS" ("ROOM_GUID", "USER_GUID")
SELECT 
    dup.guid AS ROOM_GUID,
    g.USER_GUID
FROM 
    "LOGIN" dup
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT l.LOGIN, l.NAME, MIN(g.USER_GUID) AS USER_GUID
    FROM "LOGIN" l
    INNER JOIN "GROUPS" g ON l.GUID = g.ROOM_GUID
    GROUP BY l.LOGIN, l.NAME
) g ON dup.LOGIN = g.LOGIN AND dup.NAME = g.NAME
WHERE 
    dup.GUID NOT IN (SELECT ROOM_GUID FROM "GROUPS")

WITH years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl.TRANSACT_DT_TM) AS bond_year
    FROM BOND_LIST bl
    WHERE bl.TRANSACT_DT_TM IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    br.BOND_TYPE,
    y.bond_year,
    COUNT(bl.BOND_ID) AS bond_count
FROM years y
CROSS JOIN BOND_REF br
LEFT JOIN BOND_LIST bl 
    ON br.BOND_TYPE = bl.BOND_TYPE 
    AND y.bond_year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl.TRANSACT_DT_TM)
GROUP BY br.BOND_TYPE, y.bond_year, br.BOND_SEQ
ORDER BY y.bond_year, br.BOND_SEQ

WITH cte AS (
  SELECT 
    "ID",
    "TOTAL_EMPLOYEES",
    "ID" - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "ID") AS grp
  FROM "EMPLOYEE"
  WHERE "TOTAL_EMPLOYEES" > 100
)
SELECT "ID"
FROM cte
WHERE grp IN (
  SELECT grp
  FROM cte
  GROUP BY grp
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
ORDER BY "ID"

SELECT 
  "2020", 
  "2021", 
  "2022", 
  "2023", 
  "2024",
  "2020" + "2021" + "2022" + "2023" + "2024" AS grand_total
FROM (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) AS "year",
    payment_sum
  FROM FEE
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) BETWEEN 2020 AND 2024
)
PIVOT (
  SUM(payment_sum) 
  FOR "year" IN (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024)
)

SELECT SUBSTR(STANDARD_HASH(product_id, 'SHA1'), 1, 8) AS hash_value, 
       8 AS hash_length 
FROM products

WITH atom_hierarchy (atom_id, atom_id2, bond_id, lvl, path) AS (
    SELECT
        "atom_id",
        "atom_id2",
        "bond_id",
        1 AS lvl,
        N',' || N'TR007_8' || N',' AS path
    FROM "connected"
    WHERE "atom_id" = N'TR007_8'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        c."atom_id",
        c."atom_id2",
        c."bond_id",
        ah.lvl + 1,
        ah.path || c."atom_id2" || N','
    FROM "connected" c
    JOIN atom_hierarchy ah ON c."atom_id" = ah.atom_id2
)
CYCLE atom_id SET is_cycle TO 'Y' DEFAULT 'N'
SELECT atom_id, atom_id2, bond_id, lvl
FROM atom_hierarchy
WHERE is_cycle = 'N'
ORDER BY lvl, atom_id

SELECT XMLSERIALIZE(DOCUMENT XMLELEMENT("files", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("file", XMLFOREST("id" AS "id", "team_long_name" AS "team_long_name"))
                                                        ORDER BY NLSSORT("team_long_name", 'NLS_SORT=XFRENCH'))) INDENT SIZE = 2)
FROM "Team"
WHERE "team_api_id" IN
    (SELECT "team_api_id"
     FROM "Team_Attributes"
     WHERE "date" IS NULL)

WITH match_years AS (
    SELECT
        M."league_id",
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date") AS match_year,
        COUNT(*) AS year_count
    FROM "Match" M
    WHERE M."date" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY M."league_id", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date")
),
league_stats AS (
    SELECT
        L."id" AS league_id,
        L."name" AS league_name,
        C."name" AS country_name,
        COUNT(M."id") AS total_matches
    FROM "League" L
    JOIN "Country" C ON L."country_id" = C."id"
    LEFT JOIN "Match" M ON L."id" = M."league_id"
    GROUP BY L."id", L."name", C."name"
)
SELECT
    ls.league_name,
    my.match_year AS "year",
    my.year_count AS "match_count",
    ROUND(my.year_count / NULLIF(ls.total_matches, 0) * 100, 2) AS percentage_of_total
FROM match_years my
JOIN league_stats ls ON my."league_id" = ls.league_id
WHERE my.match_year BETWEEN 2008 AND 2016
ORDER BY
    my.match_year,
    ls.league_name

WITH temp AS (
    SELECT 
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") 
        - TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$')) AS grp
    FROM "atom" a
), temp2 AS (
    SELECT 
        t."atom_id",
        t."molecule_id",
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t."molecule_id", t.grp) AS cnt
    FROM temp t
)
SELECT 
    t2."atom_id",
    t2."molecule_id"
FROM temp2 t2
WHERE t2.cnt >= 3
ORDER BY 
    t2."molecule_id",
    t2."atom_id"

WITH ordered_intervals AS (
    SELECT
        school_id,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        LAG(end_date) OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY start_date) AS prev_end,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY start_date) AS rn
    FROM school_info
),
grouped_intervals AS (
    SELECT 
        school_id,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        prev_end,
        rn,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_end IS NULL OR start_date > prev_end THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_new_group
    FROM ordered_intervals
),
group_ids AS (
    SELECT 
        school_id,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        SUM(is_new_group) OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY rn) AS group_id
    FROM grouped_intervals
)
SELECT
    school_id,
    MIN(start_date) AS first_start,
    MAX(end_date) AS end_date
FROM group_ids
GROUP BY school_id, group_id
ORDER BY school_id, first_start

WITH "MaxHeightCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        "alignment_id",
        "publisher_id",
        MAX("height_cm") AS "max_height"
    FROM "superhero"
    GROUP BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id"
),
"JoinedCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        s."alignment_id",
        s."publisher_id",
        s."hair_colour_id",
        s."height_cm"
    FROM "superhero" s
    JOIN "MaxHeightCTE" m
       ON s."alignment_id" = m."alignment_id"
      AND s."publisher_id" = m."publisher_id"
      AND s."height_cm" = m."max_height"
)
SELECT
    "alignment_id",
    "publisher_id",
    "hair_colour_id",
    SUM("hair_colour_id") OVER (PARTITION BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id") AS "total_hair_colour",
    "height_cm" AS "max_height"
FROM "JoinedCTE"
ORDER BY
    "alignment_id",
    "publisher_id"

WITH map AS (
    SELECT
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(from_atom) AS begin_atom,
        to_atom                    AS end_atom,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(start_date) AS path_start_date,
        LEVEL
    FROM toxic_mappings
    WHERE CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF = 1
    CONNECT BY NOCYCLE from_atom = PRIOR to_atom
)
SELECT
    begin_atom,
    end_atom,
    path_start_date,
    LEAD(path_start_date - 1, 1) OVER (
        PARTITION BY begin_atom
        ORDER BY path_start_date
    ) AS end_date
FROM map
ORDER BY begin_atom, path_start_date

WITH atom_bonds AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        TO_CHAR(a."element") AS "element",
        LISTAGG(c."bond_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."bond_id") AS connected_bonds
    FROM "atom" a
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY a."atom_id", a."molecule_id", TO_CHAR(a."element")
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        TO_CHAR(m."label") AS "label",
        COUNT(a."atom_id") OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS atom_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY m."molecule_id") AS rn
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
)
SELECT
    ab."atom_id",
    ab."molecule_id",
    ab."element",
    ms."label",
    SUBSTR(ab.connected_bonds, 1, INSTR(ab.connected_bonds || ',', ',') - 1) AS bond_id,
    TO_CHAR(b."bond_type") AS "bond_type"
FROM atom_bonds ab
JOIN molecule_stats ms ON ab."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id" AND ms.rn = 1
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON
    SUBSTR(ab.connected_bonds, 1, INSTR(ab.connected_bonds || ',', ',') - 1) = b."bond_id"
WHERE ab."atom_id" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ab."molecule_id", ab."atom_id"

WITH
    set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT "molecule_id", COUNT(DISTINCT DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("element", 4000, 1))
        FROM "atom"
        GROUP BY "molecule_id"
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("element", 4000, 1)) > 1
    ),
    set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT m."molecule_id", COUNT(DISTINCT DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1))
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        WHERE DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1) IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
    ),
    unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_a
    ),
    unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_b
    ),
    molecule_hierarchy AS (
        SELECT
            "molecule_id",
            CONNECT_BY_ROOT "molecule_id" AS root_molecule,
            LEVEL AS hierarchy_level
        FROM "molecule"
        CONNECT BY PRIOR "molecule_id" = "molecule_id"
        START WITH DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("label", 4000, 1) = '+'
    )
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.rn = b.rn AND a.density_rank = b.density_rank THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_b,
    LISTAGG(a.molecule_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.density_rank) AS matching_molecules,
    JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule' VALUE a.molecule_id,
            'rank' VALUE a.density_rank
        )
        ORDER BY b.density_rank
    ) AS molecule_json
FROM unique_a a
FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
LEFT JOIN molecule_hierarchy h ON a.molecule_id = h."molecule_id"
WHERE
    a.molecule_id = (SELECT "molecule_id" FROM "bond" WHERE "bond_id" = 'TR011_2_24')
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "connected" c
        JOIN "atom" a1 ON c."atom_id" = a1."atom_id"
        JOIN "atom" a2 ON c."atom_id2" = a2."atom_id"
        WHERE a1."molecule_id" = a.molecule_id
        AND DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a1."element", 4000, 1) = DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a2."element", 4000, 1)
    )
GROUP BY
    GROUPING SETS (
        (a.density_rank, b.density_rank),
        ()
    )
HAVING
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id) > (
        SELECT AVG(element_count)
        FROM set_a
    )

SELECT "molecule_id",
       LISTAGG(DISTINCT "element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "element") AS "elements"
FROM "atom"
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

SELECT "molecule_id",
       LISTAGG("atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "atom_id") AS "atom_ids"
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id", "atom_id"
    FROM "atom"
    WHERE "molecule_id" = 'TR011'
)
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

WITH "data" AS (
  SELECT '111,2,3 | 112,4,5 | 113,6,7' AS input_str FROM dual
),
split_pipes AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(input_str, '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS segment,
    LEVEL AS i
  FROM "data"
  CONNECT BY LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT(input_str, '[^|]+')
)
SELECT
  i,
  TO_NUMBER(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(segment, '[^,]+', 1, 1))) AS hero_id,
  TO_NUMBER(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(segment, '[^,]+', 1, 2))) AS attribute_id,
  TO_NUMBER(TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(segment, '[^,]+', 1, 3))) AS attribute_value
FROM split_pipes
ORDER BY i

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        "date",
        "match_api_id",
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP)) +
        EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP))/60 AS hour_of_day,
        TO_CHAR("date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS match_date_str
    FROM "Match"
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt."date",
        mt."match_api_id",
        mt.match_date_str,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_str, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times tt
)
SELECT
    TO_TIMESTAMP(dc.match_date_str || ' ' ||
           LPAD(FLOOR(dc.target_hour), 2, '0') || ':00:00',
           'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS target_datetime,
    dc."date",
    dc."match_api_id",
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance,
    (dc."date" - TO_DATE(dc.match_date_str, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) * 24 AS actual_hours,
    RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY dc.match_date_str, dc.time_period
        ORDER BY dc.time_distance, dc."match_api_id"
    ) AS final_rank
FROM distance_calc dc
WHERE dc.time_rank <= 1
  AND dc.time_distance <=
      CASE
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 8 THEN 4
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 20 THEN 3
      END
ORDER BY
    dc.match_date_str,
    dc.target_hour,
    dc.time_distance

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "molecule_id",
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(TO_CHAR("element"), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "atom"
    GROUP BY "molecule_id"
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        "bond_id",
        "molecule_id",
        "bond_type",
        LEVEL AS bond_depth,
        SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH("bond_id", '/') AS bond_path
    FROM "bond"
    START WITH "bond_id" LIKE '%\_2\_%' ESCAPE '\'
    CONNECT BY PRIOR "bond_id" = SUBSTR("bond_id", 1, INSTR("bond_id", '_', 1, 2) - 1) || '_' || 
                            TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(PRIOR "bond_id", 
                                                    INSTR(PRIOR "bond_id", '_', 1, 2) + 1)) + 1)
),
molecule_json AS (
    SELECT 
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule_id' VALUE m."molecule_id",
            'label' VALUE m."label",
            'atoms' VALUE (
                SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                    JSON_OBJECT(
                        'atom_id' VALUE a."atom_id",
                        'element' VALUE TO_CHAR(a."element")
                    )
                ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id")
                FROM "atom" a
                WHERE a."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
            )
        ) AS molecule_data
    FROM "molecule" m
)
SELECT 
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    c."atom_id2",
    stats.atom_count,
    stats.elements,
    CASE 
        WHEN JSON_EXISTS(mj.molecule_data, '$.atoms[*]?(@.element == "cl")') THEN 'Contains Chlorine'
        ELSE 'No Chlorine'
    END AS contains_cl,
    bh.bond_depth,
    bh.bond_path
FROM "molecule" m
INNER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT JOIN atom_stats stats ON m."molecule_id" = stats."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN molecule_json mj ON m."molecule_id" = mj."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b."bond_id" = bh."bond_id"
WHERE 
    (m."label" IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM "atom" a2 
        WHERE a2."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id" 
        GROUP BY a2."molecule_id" 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
    ))
    AND c."atom_id2" IN (
        SELECT a3."atom_id" 
        FROM "atom" a3 
        WHERE TO_CHAR(a3."element") = DECODE(TO_CHAR(a."element"), 'cl', 'cl', 'h', 'o', 'o', 'h', TO_CHAR(a."element"))
    )
ORDER BY 
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    COALESCE(TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(b."bond_id", '\d+', 1, 2)), 0)

WITH match_dates AS (
  SELECT 
    "id",
    "date" AS match_date,
    TO_CHAR("date", 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=English') AS day_of_week,
    "date" AS match_start_time,
    "date" + INTERVAL '2' HOUR AS match_end_time
  FROM "Match"
)
SELECT 
  m.*,
  ROUND(
    (LEAST(m.match_end_time, TRUNC(m.match_date) + INTERVAL '17:00' HOUR TO MINUTE) 
     - GREATEST(m.match_start_time, TRUNC(m.match_date) + INTERVAL '7:30' HOUR TO MINUTE)
    ) * 24 * 60
  ) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM match_dates m
WHERE 
  m.match_date - TRUNC(m.match_date, 'IW') < 5  -- Filter for weekdays (Mon-Fri)
  AND (
    LEAST(m.match_end_time, TRUNC(m.match_date) + INTERVAL '17:00' HOUR TO MINUTE) 
    > GREATEST(m.match_start_time, TRUNC(m.match_date) + INTERVAL '7:30' HOUR TO MINUTE)
  )

WITH "t" AS (
  SELECT 1 AS "from_hour", 4 AS "to_hour", 20 AS "pay" FROM dual
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 5 AS "from_hour", 8 AS "to_hour", 50 AS "pay" FROM dual
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 10 AS "from_hour", 12 AS "to_hour", 100 AS "pay" FROM dual
),
"input_data" AS (
  SELECT 6 AS "user_hours" FROM dual
)
SELECT "i"."user_hours", 
       (SELECT SUM((LEAST("t"."to_hour", "i"."user_hours") - ("t"."from_hour" - 1)) * "t"."pay")
        FROM "t"
        WHERE "i"."user_hours" >= "t"."from_hour") AS "sum_to_pay"
FROM "input_data" "i"

SELECT m."molecule_id", MIN(a."atom_id") AS first_atom_id
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
ORDER BY m."molecule_id"

WITH molecule_hierarchy (molecule_id, label, atom_id, element, lvl, path) AS (
  SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    1 AS "lvl",
    CAST(m."molecule_id" AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
  FROM "molecule" m
  JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
  WHERE TO_CHAR(a."element") = 'cl'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    mh.lvl + 1,
    mh.path || '->' || CAST(m."molecule_id" AS VARCHAR2(4000))
  FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
  JOIN "connected" c ON mh.atom_id = c."atom_id"
  JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
  JOIN "atom" a ON c."atom_id2" = a."atom_id"
  JOIN "molecule" m ON a."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
  WHERE mh.lvl < 3
    AND m."molecule_id" != TO_NCHAR(SUBSTR(mh.path, INSTR(mh.path, '->') + 2))
)
SELECT
  m."molecule_id",
  m."label",
  a."atom_id",
  a."element",
  c."atom_id2",
  b."bond_id",
  b."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" m
JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
  WHERE m."molecule_id" = mh.molecule_id
)
ORDER BY
  m."molecule_id",
  a."atom_id",
  c."atom_id2"

WITH TeamMatches AS (
    SELECT 
        home_team_api_id AS team_api_id, 
        "date" AS match_date,
        1 AS win
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE "home_team_goal" > "away_team_goal"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        away_team_api_id AS team_api_id, 
        "date" AS match_date,
        1 AS win
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE "away_team_goal" > "home_team_goal"
)
SELECT
    team_api_id,
    start_date,
    end_date,
    match_count
FROM TeamMatches
MATCH_RECOGNIZE (
    PARTITION BY team_api_id
    ORDER BY match_date
    MEASURES
        FIRST(match_date) AS start_date,
        LAST(match_date) AS end_date,
        COUNT(*) AS match_count
    ONE ROW PER MATCH
    PATTERN (A+)
    DEFINE A AS A.win = 1
)
ORDER BY team_api_id, start_date

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(TO_CHAR("date", 'YYYY.MM.DD'), '\.', '', 1, 1) AS "updated_value"
FROM "Team_Attributes"
WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL

WITH molecule_atoms AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           TO_CHAR(m."label") AS "label",
           a."atom_id",
           TO_CHAR(a."element") AS "element",
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_seq
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
),
molecule_bonds AS (
    SELECT b."molecule_id",
           b."bond_id",
           TO_CHAR(b."bond_type") AS "bond_type",
           c."atom_id" AS source_atom,
           c."atom_id2" AS target_atom,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_id") AS bond_rank
    FROM "bond" b
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON b."bond_id" = c."bond_id"
),
atom_connections AS (
    SELECT ma."molecule_id",
           ma."label",
           ma."atom_id",
           ma."element",
           mb."bond_id",
           mb."bond_type",
           CASE WHEN mb.source_atom = ma."atom_id" OR mb.target_atom = ma."atom_id"
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_connected
    FROM molecule_atoms ma
    CROSS JOIN molecule_bonds mb
    WHERE ma."molecule_id" = mb."molecule_id"
)
SELECT ac."molecule_id",
       ac."label",
       ac."atom_id",
       ac."element",
       ac."bond_id",
       ac."bond_type"
FROM atom_connections ac
WHERE ac.is_connected = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT ma."molecule_id",
       ma."label",
       ma."atom_id",
       ma."element",
       NULL AS bond_id,
       NULL AS bond_type
FROM molecule_atoms ma
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "connected" c
    WHERE c."atom_id" = ma."atom_id"
)
ORDER BY "molecule_id",
         "atom_id",
         "bond_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(
               (SELECT a2."element" 
                FROM "atom" a2 
                WHERE a2."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id" 
                ORDER BY a2."atom_id" 
                FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 
               4000, 1)
           ) AS first_element
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
atom_details AS (
    SELECT a."molecule_id",
           a."atom_id",
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_seq
    FROM "atom" a
)
SELECT m."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count,
       COALESCE(
           LISTAGG(a."atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ad.atom_seq),
           'No atoms'
       ) AS "atom_ids",
       JSON_ARRAYAGG(
           JSON_OBJECT(
               'atom_id' VALUE a."atom_id",
               'element' VALUE TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1))
           )
           ORDER BY a."atom_id"
       ) AS atom_json
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN atom_details ad ON a."atom_id" = ad."atom_id" AND a."molecule_id" = ad."molecule_id"
WHERE (ms.first_element IS NULL OR ms.first_element != 'h')
GROUP BY m."molecule_id", ms.atom_count
ORDER BY ms.atom_count DESC NULLS LAST

WITH ranked_atoms AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        a."element",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank
    FROM "atom" a
)
SELECT
    ra."atom_id",
    ra."molecule_id",
    ra."element",
    ra.atom_rank AS rnk
FROM ranked_atoms ra
WHERE ra.atom_rank <= 2
ORDER BY ra."molecule_id", ra.atom_rank

SELECT "id",
       TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("date", '[^ ]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS "date_part"
FROM "Team_Attributes"
CONNECT BY 
    LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT("date", '[^ ]+')
    AND PRIOR "id" = "id"
    AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL

WITH team_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        LAG("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS prev_speed,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS change_order
    FROM 
        "Team_Attributes"
)
SELECT 
    "team_api_id" AS "team_id",
    "date",
    prev_speed AS "old_value",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS "level",
    "buildUpPlaySpeed" AS "new_value"
FROM 
    team_changes
WHERE 
    "buildUpPlaySpeed" <> prev_speed
    OR prev_speed IS NULL
ORDER BY 
    "team_api_id", 
    "date"

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE("CDSCode", '\.([^.]*)$', '\1') AS "output"
FROM "schools"
WHERE "CDSCode" = '1110.400000.8001382'

WITH molecule_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT m."molecule_id" AS root_molecule_id,
        LEVEL AS hierarchy_level,
        SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(m."molecule_id", '/') AS molecule_path
    FROM "molecule" m
    JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    START WITH DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b."bond_type", 1, 1) = '-'
    CONNECT BY NOCYCLE
        PRIOR c."atom_id2" = c."atom_id"
),
month_generator (month_start_date, month_num) AS (
    SELECT
        TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY'),
        1
    FROM dual
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        ADD_MONTHS(month_start_date, 1),
        month_num + 1
    FROM month_generator
    WHERE month_num < 12
),
molecule_months AS (
    SELECT
        mg.month_start_date,
        mh."molecule_id",
        mh."label",
        mh.hierarchy_level,
        mh.molecule_path
    FROM month_generator mg
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT
            h."molecule_id",
            h."label",
            h.hierarchy_level,
            h.molecule_path
        FROM molecule_hierarchy h
        WHERE h.hierarchy_level <= mg.month_num
    ) mh
)
SELECT
    mm.month_start_date,
    mm."molecule_id",
    mm."label",
    mm.hierarchy_level,
    mm.molecule_path
FROM molecule_months mm
WHERE mm.month_start_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY')
                              AND TO_DATE('12/31/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY')
ORDER BY
    mm.month_start_date,
    mm.hierarchy_level,
    mm."molecule_id"

WITH "my_table" AS (
  SELECT 'A' AS "cto", 1 AS "nif", 'A1' AS "file_", 5 AS "filesize" FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'A',1,'A2',3 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'A',2,'A3',2 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'A',2,'A4',1 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'B',1,'B1',4 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'B',1,'B2',6 FROM dual
),
base_data AS (
  SELECT 
    t.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto" ORDER BY SUBSTR("file_", 1, 1), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("file_", 2))) AS "rn"
  FROM "my_table" t
)
SELECT 
  "cto",
  "nif",
  "file_",
  "partition",
  "mn" - "first_mn" + 1 AS "subpartition",
  "total_size"
FROM (
  SELECT 
    t."cto",
    t."nif",
    t."file_",
    r."partition",
    r."first_mn",
    m."mn",
    m."total_size"
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      "cto",
      "rn",
      "partition",
      FIRST_VALUE("rn") OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "partition" ORDER BY "rn") AS "first_mn"
    FROM base_data
    MATCH_RECOGNIZE (
      PARTITION BY "cto"
      ORDER BY "rn"
      MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "partition"
      ALL ROWS PER MATCH
      PATTERN (A+)
      DEFINE A AS 1=1
    )
  ) r
  JOIN (
    SELECT 
      "cto",
      "rn",
      "mn",
      "total_size"
    FROM base_data
    MATCH_RECOGNIZE (
      PARTITION BY "cto"
      ORDER BY "rn"
      MEASURES 
        MATCH_NUMBER() AS "mn",
        SUM("filesize") AS "total_size"
      ALL ROWS PER MATCH
      PATTERN (strt same_nif*)
      DEFINE 
        same_nif AS NEXT("nif") = "nif" AND SUM("filesize") + NEXT("filesize") <= 10
    )
  ) m ON r."cto" = m."cto" AND r."rn" = m."rn"
  JOIN base_data t ON r."cto" = t."cto" AND r."rn" = t."rn"
)

WITH tbl AS
  (SELECT TO_DATE('12.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS act_date
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('31.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('13.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual),
     t2 AS
  (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS act_month,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_2
   FROM tbl t
   GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
            TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')
   ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')),
     grid AS
  (SELECT t1.activation_month,
          t1.rn_1,
          t2.act_month,
          t2.rn_2
   FROM
     (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS activation_month,
             TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_1
      FROM tbl t
      GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
               TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')
      ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')) t1
   LEFT JOIN t2 ON (t1.rn_1 <= t2.rn_2)),
     molecule_activity AS
  (SELECT m."molecule_id",
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_date
   FROM tbl t
   INNER JOIN "molecule" m ON m."molecule_id" IN
     (SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "bond"
      UNION SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "atom"))
SELECT g.activation_month,
       g.act_month,
       CASE
           WHEN g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 THEN
                  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id")
                   FROM molecule_activity ma
                   WHERE ma.act_date = g.rn_1)
           ELSE
                  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id")
                   FROM molecule_activity ma
                   WHERE ma.act_date BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2)
       END AS active_molecules
FROM grid g
ORDER BY g.rn_1,
         g.rn_2

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"latest_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        G."ID",
        G."GROUPCHOICE",
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY G."ID", G."GROUPCHOICE"
            ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM "grp_choices" G
    JOIN "credits" C
        ON G."ID" = C."ID"
        AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
)

SELECT
    "ID",
    "GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE "GROUPCHOICE"
        WHEN 'ART' THEN "ARTCRED"
        WHEN 'BIZ' THEN "BIZCRED"
        WHEN 'HUM' THEN "HUMCRED"
        WHEN 'NAT' THEN "NATCRED"
        WHEN 'TEK' THEN "TEKCRED"
        WHEN 'GEN' THEN "GENCRED"
        ELSE 0
    END AS "TOTAL_CREDITS"
FROM "latest_credits"
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "ID", "GROUPCHOICE"

WITH molecule_atoms AS (
  SELECT "molecule_id",
         COUNT("atom_id") AS atom_count
  FROM "atom"
  GROUP BY "molecule_id"
)
SELECT "molecule_id",
       level AS atom_number
FROM molecule_atoms
CONNECT BY 
  level <= atom_count
  AND PRIOR "molecule_id" = "molecule_id"
  AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL
ORDER SIBLINGS BY "molecule_id"

SELECT "team_api_id",
       "buildUpPlaySpeed",
       "date"
FROM
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          "buildUpPlaySpeed",
          "date",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id"
                             ORDER BY "date" DESC) AS seq
   FROM "Team_Attributes")
WHERE seq = 1

WITH player_data AS (
    SELECT
        p."player_api_id" AS player_id,
        'name' AS attribute_type,
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p."player_name", 4000, 1) AS attribute_value
    FROM "Player" p
    WHERE p."player_api_id" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        pa."player_api_id" AS player_id,
        'rating' AS attribute_type,
        TO_NCHAR(TO_CHAR(pa."overall_rating")) AS attribute_value  -- Convert to NVARCHAR2
    FROM "Player_Attributes" pa
    WHERE pa."date" = (
        SELECT MAX("date")
        FROM "Player_Attributes"
        WHERE "player_api_id" = pa."player_api_id"
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        pa."player_api_id" AS player_id,
        'foot' AS attribute_type,
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(pa."preferred_foot", 4000, 1) AS attribute_value
    FROM "Player_Attributes" pa
    WHERE pa."date" = (
        SELECT MAX("date")
        FROM "Player_Attributes"
        WHERE "player_api_id" = pa."player_api_id"
    )
),
player_stats AS (
    SELECT
        player_id,
        attribute_type,
        attribute_value,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY player_id, attribute_type 
            ORDER BY (CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN TO_NUMBER(attribute_value) ELSE 0 END) DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM player_data
)
SELECT
    player_id AS col1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'name' THEN attribute_value END) AS nom,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END) AS rating,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'foot' THEN attribute_value END) AS foot
FROM player_stats
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY player_id
HAVING 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'name' THEN 1 END) > 0 AND
    COUNT(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN 1 END) > 0 AND
    COUNT(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'foot' THEN 1 END) > 0
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END)) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

WITH match_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."date" AS "match_date",
        "l"."name" AS "league_name",
        "c"."name" AS "country_name",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("ht"."team_long_name", 4000, 1) AS "home_team",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("at"."team_long_name", 4000, 1) AS "away_team",
        "m"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
        "m"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "m"."league_id", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("m"."season", 4000, 1)
                     ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" + "m"."away_team_goal" DESC) AS "high_scoring_rank"
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "League" "l" ON "m"."league_id" = "l"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Country" "c" ON "m"."country_id" = "c"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "ht" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ht"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "at" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "at"."team_api_id"
),
team_performance AS (
    SELECT
        "team_long_name",
        AVG(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "avg_goals_per_match"
    FROM (
        SELECT "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals", "home_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
        UNION ALL
        SELECT "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals", "away_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
    )
    GROUP BY "team_long_name"
)
SELECT
    ms."match_date",
    ms."league_name",
    ms."country_name",
    ms."home_team",
    ms."away_team",
    ms."home_team_goals",
    ms."away_team_goals",
    ms."high_scoring_rank",
    htp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "home_team_avg_goals",
    atp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "away_team_avg_goals"
FROM match_stats ms
LEFT JOIN team_performance htp ON ms."home_team" = htp."team_long_name"
LEFT JOIN team_performance atp ON ms."away_team" = atp."team_long_name"
WHERE ms."high_scoring_rank" <= 10
ORDER BY ms."match_date" DESC

WITH "MY_TABLE" AS (
  SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID", 'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE" FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT '1111', '50000' FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT '2222', 'FWDNOTLCR' FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT '2222', '50000' FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT '3333', '50000' FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT '3333', 'DUMMY' FROM DUAL
),
"MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" AS (
  SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION", 'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE", 1 AS "PRIORITY" FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'NOTIONALDB', 1 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'FWDNOTLCR', 2 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'FWDNOTLDR', 2 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'SWOFFBALCR', 2 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'SWOFFBALDR', 2 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'SWFWNOTLCR', 2 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', 'SWFWNOTLDB', 2 FROM DUAL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SW', '50000', 3 FROM DUAL
),
"CTE" ("TECHNICAL_ID", "ASSET_TYPE", "rn") AS (  -- Explicit column alias list
  SELECT
    X."TECHNICAL_ID",
    X."ASSET_TYPE",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY X."TECHNICAL_ID"
      ORDER BY MRAT."PRIORITY"
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "MY_TABLE" X
  INNER JOIN "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" MRAT
    ON X."ASSET_TYPE" = MRAT."ASSET_TYPE"
  WHERE MRAT."APPLICATION" = 'SW'
)
SELECT "TECHNICAL_ID", "ASSET_TYPE"
FROM "CTE"
WHERE "rn" = 1

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT m."country_id",
           m."date",
           m."league_id",
           m."season",
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."country_id" ORDER BY m."date" DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."date" IS NOT NULL
),
country_stats AS (
    SELECT c."id" AS country_id,
           c."name" AS country_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."league_id") AS league_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(m."season")) AS season_count  -- Convert NCLOB to string for distinct count
    FROM "Country" c
    LEFT JOIN "Match" m ON c."id" = m."country_id"
    GROUP BY c."id", c."name"
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT md."country_id",
           md."date",
           md.match_rank,
           LISTAGG(l."name", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY l."name") AS leagues_played
    FROM match_dates md
    JOIN "League" l ON md."league_id" = l."id"
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
    GROUP BY md."country_id", md."date", md.match_rank
)
SELECT cs.country_id,
       cs.country_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) AS last_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms."date" END) AS prev_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues,
       cs.league_count,
       cs.season_count
FROM country_stats cs
LEFT JOIN match_summary ms ON cs.country_id = ms."country_id"
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) DESC

WITH atom_elements AS (
    SELECT a."atom_id",
           a."molecule_id",
           a."element",
           RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS element_rank
    FROM "atom" a
),
bond_details AS (
    SELECT b."bond_id",
           b."molecule_id",
           b."bond_type",
           DENSE_RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY b."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_id") AS bond_rank
    FROM "bond" b
)
SELECT ae."atom_id",
       ae."molecule_id",
       ae."element",
       c."bond_id",
       CASE
           WHEN bd."bond_type" IS NULL THEN TO_NCLOB('Unknown')
           ELSE bd."bond_type"
       END AS bond_type
FROM atom_elements ae
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON ae."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN bond_details bd ON c."bond_id" = bd."bond_id"
                         AND ae."molecule_id" = bd."molecule_id"
                         AND ae.element_rank = bd.bond_rank
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "molecule" m
    WHERE m."molecule_id" = ae."molecule_id"
    AND m."label" IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY ae."atom_id"

SELECT 
    "t"."team_api_id",
    "m"."id",
    "m"."home_team_api_id",
    "m"."away_team_api_id",
    "m"."home_team_goal",
    "m"."away_team_goal",
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
            ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
        END
    ) OVER (
        PARTITION BY "t"."team_api_id"
        ORDER BY "m"."id"
    ) AS "goal_difference"
FROM 
    "Match" "m"
INNER JOIN 
    "Team" "t" 
    ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
    OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
WHERE 
    "m"."date" = TO_DATE('2008-11-22', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY 
    "t"."team_api_id",
    "m"."id"

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        a."molecule_id",
        COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "atom" a
    GROUP BY a."molecule_id"
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        "bond_id",
        "molecule_id",
        "bond_type",
        REGEXP_SUBSTR("bond_id", '[^_]+', 1, 1) AS molecule_prefix,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("bond_id", '[^_]+', 1, 2)) AS first_atom_num,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("bond_id", '[^_]+', 1, 3)) AS second_atom_num
    FROM "bond"
),
molecule_connectivity AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1) AS label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c."atom_id") AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        CASE
            WHEN DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1) = '+' THEN 'Positive'
            WHEN DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1) = '-' THEN 'Negative'
            ELSE 'Neutral'
        END AS charge_type
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1)
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1) AS label,
    a."atom_id",
    DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1) AS element,
    b."bond_id",
    DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b."bond_type", 4000, 1) AS bond_type,
    ast.atom_count,
    ast.elements,
    bh.first_atom_num + bh.second_atom_num AS atom_sum,
    mc.connected_atoms,
    mc.charge_type,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b."bond_type", 4000, 1)) AS bond_type_rank
FROM "molecule" m
INNER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT JOIN atom_stats ast ON m."molecule_id" = ast."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b."bond_id" = bh."bond_id"
LEFT JOIN molecule_connectivity mc ON m."molecule_id" = mc."molecule_id"
WHERE DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1) IN (SELECT DISTINCT DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("element", 4000, 1) FROM "atom" WHERE "molecule_id" LIKE 'TR%')
  AND b."bond_type" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    atom_rank,
    bh.first_atom_num

SELECT T."team_long_name",
       T."team_short_name",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeed",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
       TA."chanceCreationShooting",
       TA."chanceCreationShootingClass",
       TA."defencePressure",
       TA."defencePressureClass"
FROM "Team" T
INNER JOIN "Team_Attributes" TA ON T."team_api_id" = TA."team_api_id"
WHERE TA."date" = TO_DATE('2013-09-20 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT
  "valid_from",
  "valid_until",
  "cumulative_count" AS "count"
FROM (
  SELECT
    "event_date" AS "valid_from",
    LEAD("event_date") OVER (ORDER BY "event_date") - INTERVAL '1' SECOND AS "valid_until",
    SUM("event_type") OVER (ORDER BY "event_date") AS "cumulative_count"
  FROM (
    -- Start dates with +1 increment
    SELECT 
      "valid_from" AS "event_date",
      1 AS "event_type"
    FROM (
      SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from", TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until" FROM DUAL
      UNION ALL
      SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from", TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until" FROM DUAL
    )
    UNION ALL
    -- End dates with -1 decrement (adjusted by 1 day to mark end of validity)
    SELECT 
      "valid_until" + INTERVAL '1' DAY AS "event_date",
      -1 AS "event_type"
    FROM (
      SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from", TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until" FROM DUAL
      UNION ALL
      SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from", TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until" FROM DUAL
    )
  )
)
WHERE "cumulative_count" > 0
AND ("valid_from" <= "valid_until" OR "valid_until" IS NULL)

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s."CDSCode" AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s."Charter" = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s."Magnet" = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(s."County"), 1, INSTR(TO_CHAR(s."County"), ' ') - 1) AS "col3",
    TO_DATE(
      TO_CHAR(s."LastUpdate", 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ' ||
      LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM, 24), 2, '0') || ':' ||
      LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM * 7, 60), 2, '0'),
      'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'
    ) AS "col4"
  FROM "schools" s
  WHERE TO_CHAR(s."StatusType") = 'Active'
    AND s."LastUpdate" IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."pk",
    sd."col2",
    sd."col3",
    sd."col4"
  FROM school_data sd
  WHERE sd."col4" >= TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:00', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
    AND sd."col4" < TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:05', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
),
aggregated_data AS (
  SELECT
    fd."col2",
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT fd."col3", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fd."col3") AS "col3_list"
  FROM filtered_data fd
  GROUP BY fd."col2"
)

SELECT
  ad."col2",
  ad."col3_list" AS "col3",
  COUNT(fd."pk") AS "record_count"
FROM aggregated_data ad
LEFT JOIN filtered_data fd ON fd."col2" = ad."col2"
GROUP BY ad."col2", ad."col3_list"
ORDER BY "record_count" DESC

SELECT "molecule"."molecule_id",
       "molecule"."label",
       "atom"."atom_id",
       "atom"."element",
       "bond"."bond_id",
       "bond"."bond_type",
       "connected"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule"
INNER JOIN "atom" ON "molecule"."molecule_id" = "atom"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" ON "atom"."atom_id" = "connected"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" ON "connected"."bond_id" = "bond"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "molecule"."molecule_id",
         "atom"."atom_id",
         "connected"."atom_id2",
         TO_CHAR("bond"."bond_type")

WITH molecule_labels AS (
    SELECT
        "molecule_id",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("label", 4000, 1) AS "label"
    FROM "molecule"
),
atom_elements AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id" AS "atom_id",
        a."molecule_id" AS "molecule_id",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1) AS "element",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS element_rank
    FROM "atom" a
),
bond_details AS (
    SELECT
        b."bond_id" AS "bond_id",
        b."molecule_id" AS "molecule_id",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b."bond_type", 4000, 1) AS "bond_type",
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_id") AS bond_rank
    FROM "bond" b
),
molecule_connections AS (
    SELECT
        c."atom_id" AS "atom_id",
        c."atom_id2" AS "atom_id2",
        c."bond_id" AS "bond_id",
        LISTAGG(c."atom_id2", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."atom_id2") OVER (PARTITION BY c."atom_id") AS "connected_atoms"
    FROM "connected" c
)
SELECT
    ml."molecule_id",
    ml."label",
    ae."atom_id",
    ae."element",
    bd."bond_id",
    bd."bond_type",
    mc."connected_atoms"
FROM molecule_labels ml
LEFT JOIN atom_elements ae ON ml."molecule_id" = ae."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN molecule_connections mc ON ae."atom_id" = mc."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN bond_details bd ON mc."bond_id" = bd."bond_id"
WHERE ae.element_rank <= 10
  AND bd.bond_rank <= 5
  AND (ml."label" IS NULL OR ml."label" IN ('+', '-'))
  AND mc."connected_atoms" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    ml."molecule_id",
    ae."atom_id",
    bd."bond_id"

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") / COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS result
FROM "molecule" m
INNER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"

WITH atom_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count
    FROM "atom" a
    GROUP BY a."molecule_id"
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        b."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "bond" b
    GROUP BY b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id" AS ID,
    COALESCE(ac.atom_count, 0) AS QTY,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS VALUE
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN atom_counts ac ON m."molecule_id" = ac."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON m."molecule_id" = bc."molecule_id"

WITH atom_data AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id" AS "atom_id",
        a."molecule_id" AS "molecule_id",
        CASE
            WHEN DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1) = 'cl' THEN UPPER(CAST(a."element" AS VARCHAR2(4000)))
            ELSE CAST(a."element" AS VARCHAR2(4000))
        END AS "element"
    FROM "atom" a
),
bond_data AS (
    SELECT
        b."bond_id" AS "bond_id",
        b."molecule_id" AS "molecule_id",
        CAST(b."bond_type" AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS "bond_type"
    FROM "bond" b
),
molecule_elements AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id" AS "molecule_id",
        LISTAGG(CAST(a."element" AS VARCHAR2(4000)), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS "elements"
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN atom_data a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(a."atom_id", b."bond_id") AS "id",
    COALESCE(a."molecule_id", b."molecule_id") AS "molecule_id",
    COALESCE(a."element", b."bond_type") AS "val",
    me."elements" AS "molecule_composition"
FROM atom_data a
FULL OUTER JOIN bond_data b ON a."molecule_id" = b."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN molecule_elements me ON COALESCE(a."molecule_id", b."molecule_id") = me."molecule_id"
WHERE (a."atom_id" IS NOT NULL OR b."bond_id" IS NOT NULL)
  AND (
      me."elements" LIKE '%cl%'
      OR me."elements" IS NULL
      OR REGEXP_LIKE(COALESCE(a."element", b."bond_type"), '^[a-z]+$')
  )
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN a."atom_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 2
    END,
    "id",
    "molecule_id"

WITH "data" AS (
  SELECT 101 AS "id", 'A' AS "type", 10 AS "part" FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 101, 'B', 10 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 101, 'B', 10 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 101, 'B', 20 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 101, 'C', 30 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 102, 'A', 10 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 102, 'B', 25 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 103, 'A', 25 FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 103, 'B', 25 FROM dual
),
"w_cnt" AS (
  SELECT "id", "part", COUNT(*) AS "cnt"
  FROM "data"
  WHERE "type" = 'B'  -- Filter B-type records before counting
  GROUP BY "id", "part"
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT d."id", d."type", d."part"
FROM "data" d
INNER JOIN "w_cnt" w 
  ON d."id" = w."id"
 AND d."part" = w."part"
WHERE d."type" = 'B'

WITH molecule_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id" AS molecule_id,
        m."label" AS label,
        a."atom_id" AS atom_id,
        a."element" AS element,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS atom_id2,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_id,
