        CAST(NULL AS NCLOB) AS bond_type,
        1 AS lvl,
        CAST(a."atom_id" AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS "path"
    FROM "molecule" m
    JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        h.molecule_id,
        h.label,
        h.atom_id,
        h.element,
        c."atom_id2" AS atom_id2,
        c."bond_id" AS bond_id,
        b."bond_type" AS bond_type,
        h.lvl + 1,
        h."path" || '->' || c."atom_id2"
    FROM molecule_hierarchy h
    JOIN "connected" c ON h.atom_id = c."atom_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    WHERE h.lvl < 3
    AND INSTR(h."path", c."atom_id2") = 0
),
pivoted_elements AS (
    SELECT
        "molecule_id",
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 1, element)) AS element1,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 2, element)) AS element2,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 3, element)) AS element3
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "molecule_id",
            "element",
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY "molecule_id" ORDER BY "atom_id") AS rn
        FROM "atom"
    ) t
    GROUP BY "molecule_id"
)

SELECT
    m."molecule_id" AS molecule_id,
    m."label" AS label,
    a."atom_id" AS atom_id,
    JSON_OBJECT(
        'element' VALUE a."element",
        'connected_atoms' VALUE (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'atom_id' VALUE c."atom_id2",
                    'bond_type' VALUE b."bond_type"
                )
                ORDER BY c."atom_id2"
            )
            FROM "connected" c
            LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
            WHERE c."atom_id" = a."atom_id"
        )
    ) AS atom_details,
    c."atom_id2" AS atom_id2,
    b."bond_id" AS bond_id,
    b."bond_type" AS bond_type,
    pe.element1,
    pe.element2,
    pe.element3,
    LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS elements_list
FROM "molecule" m
JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND m."molecule_id" = SUBSTR(b."bond_id", 1, INSTR(b."bond_id", '_') - 1)
LEFT JOIN pivoted_elements pe ON m."molecule_id" = pe."molecule_id"
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
    WHERE mh.molecule_id = m."molecule_id"
    AND mh.lvl > 1
)
ORDER BY m."molecule_id", a."atom_id", c."atom_id2"

WITH "columns" ("column_name") AS (
  SELECT 'CDSCode' FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'StatusType' FROM dual
  UNION ALL SELECT 'School' FROM dual
),
"column_exists" AS (
  SELECT c."column_name",
         NVL2(a.COLUMN_NAME, 'YES', 'NO') AS "column_exists"
  FROM "columns" c
  LEFT JOIN all_tab_columns a 
    ON a.table_name = 'schools'
    AND c."column_name" = a.COLUMN_NAME
)
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM "column_exists"
  PIVOT (
    MAX("column_exists") 
    FOR "column_name" IN ('CDSCode' AS "cdscode", 'StatusType' AS "statustype", 'School' AS "school")
  )
)
WHERE "cdscode" = 'YES'

SELECT "molecule_id",
       REPLACE("label", '+', '-') AS "label"
FROM "molecule"

WITH "a" ("test") AS (
  SELECT "test" FROM (
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details ' AS "test" FROM dual
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|' FROM dual
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16' FROM dual
  )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "test" || '|MoreData' FROM "a"
  WHERE (LENGTH("test") - LENGTH(REPLACE("test", '|', ''))) < 4
)
SELECT "test",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("test", '^(([^|]*)\|){0,4}[^|]*') AS "res"
FROM "a"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1) AS label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1)
),
atom_details AS (
    SELECT
        a."molecule_id",
        a."atom_id",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1) AS element,
        LISTAGG(c."atom_id2", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."atom_id2") AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c."bond_id") AS bonds_per_atom
    FROM "atom" a
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY a."molecule_id", a."atom_id", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1)
)
SELECT
    ms."molecule_id",
    ms.label,
    ad."atom_id",
    ad.element,
    c."bond_id",
    DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b."bond_type", 4000, 1) AS bond_type,
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ad.connected_atoms,
    ad.bonds_per_atom
FROM molecule_stats ms
JOIN atom_details ad ON ms."molecule_id" = ad."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON ad."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE ms.atom_count > 0
  AND (ad.bonds_per_atom > 0 OR c."bond_id" IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN ms.label = '+' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    ms."molecule_id",
    ad."atom_id",
    c."bond_id"

WITH molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, 1, INSTR(pair_str, ',') - 1))
            ELSE pair_str
        END AS mol_id1,
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, INSTR(pair_str, ',') + 1))
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mol_id2
    FROM (
        SELECT 'TR427, TR430' AS pair_str FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR427, TR431' FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR430, TR431' FROM DUAL
    )
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        TO_NCHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1)) AS "label",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(
            TO_NCHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1)), 
            ','
        ) WITHIN GROUP (
            ORDER BY TO_NCHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a."element", 4000, 1))
        ) ON OVERFLOW TRUNCATE AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON m."molecule_id" = b."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id", TO_NCHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m."label", 4000, 1))
)
SELECT
    m1."molecule_id" AS molecule_id1,
    m1."label" AS label1,
    m1.atom_count,
    m1.elements,
    m2."molecule_id" AS molecule_id2,
    m2."label" AS label2,
    m2.atom_count,
    m2.elements,
    CASE
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 AND m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN N'Both have bonds'
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0
        THEN N'Only ' || m1."molecule_id" || N' has bonds'
        WHEN m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN N'Only ' || m2."molecule_id" || N' has bonds'
        ELSE N'Neither has bonds'
    END AS bond_status
FROM molecule_stats m1
JOIN molecule_pairs mp ON m1."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id1
JOIN molecule_stats m2 ON m2."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id2
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "connected" c1
    JOIN "connected" c2 ON c1."bond_id" = c2."bond_id"
    WHERE c1."atom_id" LIKE m1."molecule_id" || '%'
    AND c2."atom_id" LIKE m2."molecule_id" || '%'
)
ORDER BY
    m1."molecule_id",
    m2."molecule_id"

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       TO_CHAR("a"."element") AS "element",
       "b"."bond_id",
       TO_CHAR("b"."bond_type") AS "bond_type",
       "c"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         TO_CHAR("b"."bond_type")

WITH string1_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('24,36,78,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('24,36,78,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('24,36,78,98', ',')) + 1
),
string2_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('25,36,88,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('25,36,88,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('25,36,88,98', ',')) + 1
),
string1_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string1_tab
),
string2_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string2_tab
),
common_values AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT s1.num_value
    FROM string1_parsed s1
    INNER JOIN string2_parsed s2
    ON s1.num_value = s2.num_value
)
SELECT LISTAGG(num_value, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY num_value) AS common_values
FROM common_values

WITH t AS (
  SELECT 
    "date",
    "match_api_id" AS code,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date") AS duration,
    COUNT(*) OVER (
      PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id", TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")
    ) AS cnt,
    MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) OVER (
      PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id"
    ) AS min_dur
  FROM "Match"
)
SELECT 
  t."date",
  t.code,
  t.duration,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.min_dur = 0 OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC(t."date"), t.code) > 1 THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
  END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE t."date" = TO_DATE('2008-11-22 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."element"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id"  -- Changed atom_id2 to atom_id (correct column from atom table)

SELECT 
  b."bond_id",
  b."molecule_id",
  b."bond_type",
  GREATEST(
    ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), m.months), 
    SYSDATE
  ) AS bond_formation_date
FROM 
  "bond" b
CROSS JOIN
  (SELECT level AS months FROM dual CONNECT BY level <= 5) m
WHERE 
  b."molecule_id" = 'TR011'

SELECT JSON_OBJECTAGG(
         TO_CHAR("country_id") VALUE "json_array" 
         RETURNING CLOB
       ) AS json_output
FROM (
  SELECT "country_id", 
         JSON_ARRAYAGG(
           JSON_OBJECT(
             'date' VALUE "date",
             'home_team_goal' VALUE "home_team_goal",
             'away_team_goal' VALUE "away_team_goal"
             RETURNING CLOB
           )
           RETURNING CLOB
         ) AS "json_array"
  FROM "Match"
  GROUP BY "country_id"
)

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(a."element"), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TO_CHAR(a."element")) AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
molecule_pivot AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m."molecule_id",
            TO_CHAR(a."element") AS element,
            COUNT(*) AS element_count
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id", TO_CHAR(a."element")
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(element_count)
        FOR element IN ('cl' AS chlorine, 'c' AS carbon, 'h' AS hydrogen, 'o' AS oxygen, 'n' AS nitrogen)
    )
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    TO_CHAR(m."label") AS label,
    a."atom_id",
    TO_CHAR(a."element") AS element,
    b."bond_id",
    TO_CHAR(b."bond_type") AS bond_type,
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ms.elements,
    mp.chlorine,
    mp.carbon,
    mp.hydrogen,
    mp.oxygen,
    mp.nitrogen,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY TO_CHAR(b."bond_type")) AS bond_type_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN TO_CHAR(a."element") = 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
        WHEN TO_CHAR(a."element") = 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
        WHEN TO_CHAR(a."element") = 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
        WHEN TO_CHAR(a."element") = 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
        WHEN TO_CHAR(a."element") = 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
        ELSE TO_CHAR(a."element")
    END AS element_name
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_pivot mp ON m."molecule_id" = mp."molecule_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    b."bond_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
bond_stats AS (
    SELECT b."molecule_id",
           COUNT(b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "bond" b
    GROUP BY b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT ms."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count AS "total_atoms",
       bs.bond_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               ROUND(bs.bond_count / ms.atom_count, 2)
           ELSE 0
       END AS bonds_per_atom,
       ms.elements
FROM molecule_stats ms
LEFT JOIN bond_stats bs ON ms."molecule_id" = bs."molecule_id"
WHERE ms.elements LIKE '%cl%'
ORDER BY ms."molecule_id"

WITH team_speed_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) as "rn",
        AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("buildUpPlaySpeedClass", 4000, 1)) as "class_avg_speed"
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
),
match_details AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."id",
        "m"."date",
        "m"."home_team_api_id",
        "m"."away_team_api_id",
        "m"."home_team_goal",
        "m"."away_team_goal",
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("t"."team_long_name", 4000, 1) as home_team_name,
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("t2"."team_long_name", 4000, 1) as away_team_name,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as home_speed,
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("ta"."buildUpPlaySpeedClass", 4000, 1) as home_speed_class,
        "ta_away"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as away_speed,
        "ts"."class_avg_speed",
        (SELECT AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") FROM "Team_Attributes") as overall_avg_speed
    FROM "Match" "m"
    JOIN "Team" "t" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team" "t2" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t2"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ta"."team_api_id"
    LEFT JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta_away" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "ta_away"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta_away"."date" <= "m"."date"
    JOIN team_speed_stats "ts" ON "ta"."team_api_id" = "ts"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" = "ts"."buildUpPlaySpeed"
        AND "ts"."rn" = 1
    WHERE "m"."date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2015-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2016-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
)
SELECT
    "id",
    "date",
    "home_team_api_id",
    "away_team_api_id",
    "home_team_goal",
    "away_team_goal",
    home_team_name,
    away_team_name,
    home_speed,
    home_speed_class,
    away_speed,
    CASE
        WHEN home_speed > "class_avg_speed" THEN 'Above Class Average'
        ELSE 'Below Class Average'
    END as speed_comparison
FROM match_details
WHERE home_speed > overall_avg_speed
ORDER BY "home_team_goal" DESC, "away_team_goal" ASC

with lose_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2011 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_5,
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2012 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   group by "team_api_id"),
     profit_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2011 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_5,
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2012 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   group by "team_api_id")
select l.lose_5,
       p.profit_5,
       l.lose_10,
       p.profit_10,
       coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id") as "team_api_id"
from lose_agg l
full outer join profit_agg p on l."team_api_id" = p."team_api_id"
order by coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id")
